items.title_en: UNIX99, a UNIX-like OS for the TI-99/4A (2025)
items.title_zh: UNIX99，为 TI-99/4A 提供类 UNIX 操作系统
items.summary_en: UNIX99 is a UNIX-like OS for the TI-99/4A, reviving classic hardware with modern OS concepts. The project showcases the enduring appeal of retro machines and the feasibility of reimagining vintage tech with contemporary tooling.
items.summary_zh: UNIX99 为 TI-99/4A 提供了类 UNIX 操作系统，借助现代工具对经典硬件进行再活化。该项目体现了对复古计算机的持续热情，以及用当代技术改造老硬件的可行性。

items.title_en: Verified Spec-Driven Development (VSDD)
items.title_zh: 经验证的规范驱动开发（VSDD）
items.summary_en: Verified Spec-Driven Development advocates anchoring software work to verified specifications, then deriving tests and implementations from them. It emphasizes keeping specs honest, aligning teams, and reducing misinterpretation.
items.summary_zh: 经验证的规范驱动开发主张以经过验证的规范为基石，进而推导测试与实现，强调保持规范的准确性、促成团队对齐并降低误解风险。

items.title_en: You Want to Visit the UK? You Better Have a Google Play or App Store Account
items.title_zh: 想去英国？你最好有 Google Play 或 App Store 账户
items.summary_en: Visiting the UK may hinge on having a Google Play or App Store account, illustrating how digital ecosystems influence travel and border interactions.
items.summary_zh: 访问英国可能需要使用 Google Play 或 App Store 账户，凸显数字生态系统对旅行和边境政策的影响，以及平台依赖带来的不便与议题。

items.title_en: Claude becomes number one app on the U.S. App Store
items.title_zh: Claude 成为美国 App Store 的第一名应用
items.summary_en: Claude's mobile app climbs to the top of US App Store charts, signaling high mainstream adoption of AI assistants. It raises questions about data privacy, on-device vs cloud processing, and mobile UX competition.
items.summary_zh: Claude 的移动应用登顶美国 App Store 榜单，显示 AI 助手已进入主流使用。引发关于数据隐私、边缘计算与移动端用户体验竞争的讨论。

items.title_en: Show HN: Emdash – Open-source agentic development environment
items.title_zh: Show HN：Emdash — 开源的智能代理开发环境
items.summary_en: Emdash provides an open-source agentic development environment, aiming to streamline building, testing, and evaluating AI agents. It includes tooling to compose prompts, tools, and evaluation workflows.
items.summary_zh: Emdash 是一个开源的智能代理开发环境，旨在简化构建、测试和评估 AI 代理的过程，提供组合提示、工具与评估工作流的工具。

items.title_en: Palm OS User Interface Guidelines (2003) [pdf]
items.title_zh: Palm OS 用户界面指南（2003）[PDF]
items.summary_en: A 2003 Palm OS UI guideline document offers historical insight into early mobile UX constraints and patterns. Reading it reveals how design decisions shaped usability under hardware limits.
items.summary_zh: Palm OS 的 2003 年用户界面指南提供了早期移动 UX 的设计思路与约束，阅读可看到当时的可用性取舍如何塑造用户体验。

items.title_en: US Military leaders meet with Anthropic to argue against Claude safeguards
items.title_zh: 美军高层会见 Anthropic，推动削弱 Claude 的安全措施
items.summary_en: US military leaders meet Anthropic to argue against Claude safeguards, signaling interest in deploying AI for defense while raising concerns about safety and dual-use risks.
items.summary_zh: 美国军事高层会见 Anthropic，主张削弱 Claude 的安全措施，暴露出将 AI 用于防务的兴趣及对安全与双重用途风险的担忧。

items.title_en: Show HN: enveil – hide your .env secrets from prAIng eyes
items.title_zh: Show HN：enveil——从 prAIng Eyes 隐藏你的 .env 秘密
items.summary_en: Show HN: enveil — a tool to hide your .env secrets from prompt injection attempts, protecting confidential config in AI prompts.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：enveil 是一个用于在 AI 提示中隐藏 .env 秘密、防止提示注入的安全工具。

items.title_en: Hugging Face Skills
items.title_zh: Hugging Face Skills
items.summary_en: Hugging Face launches Skills, a framework for modular AI capabilities, enabling more composable and reusable AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: Hugging Face 推出 Skills 框架，提供模块化的 AI 能力组件，便于组合和复用工具。

items.title_en: An interactive intro to quadtrees
items.title_zh: 四叉树互动入门
items.summary_en: Quadtrees provide efficient spatial indexing for range queries and collision detection. The interactive guide lets readers experiment with subdivision and performance trade-offs through visuals.
items.summary_zh: 四叉树是一种高效的空间索引结构，适用于范围查询与碰撞检测。该互动指南通过可视化让读者直观实验分割与性能权衡。

items.title_en: Why XML tags are so fundamental to Claude
items.title_zh: 为什么 XML 标签对 Claude 至关重要
items.summary_en: XML tags give Claude a structured language to mark roles, blocks, and data in prompts, helping the model disambiguate tasks and enforce output formats. The article argues these tags are foundational for reliable prompt engineering with Claude and similar assistants. Practical guidance for building AI-powered workflows centers on leveraging structured tagging to improve consistency and interoperability.
items.summary_zh: XML 标签为 Claude 提供结构化的输入标记，以区分角色、区块与数据，从而帮助模型更好地理解任务并统一输出格式。文章认为这类标签是 Claude 等助手实现更可靠提示工程的基础，并给出在 AI 工作流中利用结构化标记提升一致性和互操作性的实践要点。

items.title_en: How to talk to anyone, and why you should
items.title_zh: 如何和任何人交谈，以及为何应该
items.summary_en: Talking to strangers isn’t just social nicety—it's a skill with real payoff in work and life. The piece offers practical tips for starting conversations, listening actively, and reading social cues, arguing that improved communication builds opportunities and trust. Small changes can boost confidence and collaboration in everyday interactions.
items.summary_zh: 与陌生人交谈不仅是一种社交礼仪，而是一项在工作与生活中都能带来实际收益的技能。文章给出实用建议，涵盖如何开启对话、积极倾听与解读社交线索，主张提升沟通能力能带来机会和信任。即便是小小的改变，也能显著提升自信心与协作效果。

items.title_en: This time is different
items.title_zh: 这次真的不同
items.summary_en: This time is different argues that current tech trends are not just repeats of past cycles, urging careful consideration of AI-driven platforms, regulation, and capital dynamics to avoid repeating mistakes.
items.summary_zh: 作者主张当前的科技潮流并非简单地重复过去的周期，提醒读者关注 AI 驱动的平台、监管与资金流的不同作用，避免过度乐观或悲观。

items.title_en: Show HN: RetroTick – Run classic Windows EXEs in the browser
items.title_zh: Show HN：RetroTick——在浏览器中运行经典 Windows 可执行文件
items.summary_en: RetroTick lets you run classic Windows EXEs in the browser, enabling quick preservation and access to old software without local installation. It demonstrates browser-based emulation advances.
items.summary_zh: RetroTick 让你在浏览器中运行经典 Windows 可执行文件，便于无安装地访问与保存旧软件，体现浏览器仿真技术的进步。

items.title_en: Operational issue – Multiple services (UAE)

items.summary_en: A regional AWS Health status shows degraded operations affecting several services in the UAE. The notice outlines service impact and recovery expectations, underscoring how regional outages can ripple to regional customers. It highlights the value of diverse regions and robust incident response.
items.summary_zh: 地区性 AWS 健康状况报告显示阿联酋多项服务出现降级，影响若干服务。公告描述了受影响的服务与预计恢复时间，强调区域性故障也会波及当地客户的重要性，并凸显多区域部署与应急响应的重要性。

items.summary_en: Ubuntu using Rust signals a broader industry shift toward Rust for system-level reliability; discusses implications for kernel, libraries, and package ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Ubuntu 在系统层面采用 Rust，标志着对 Rust 在内核、库与包生态中的更广泛应用，带来安全与性能方面的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Breaking Free
items.title_zh: Breaking Free
items.summary_en: A watchdog organization calls for more digital rights protection, outlining steps to break free from data harvesting.

items.title_en: Crawling a billion web pages in just over 24 hours, in 2025
items.title_zh: 在短短一天多一点的时间内爬取十亿网页（2025 年）
items.summary_en: A web crawler managed to crawl a billion pages in a little over 24 hours, illustrating the current scale and efficiency of distributed crawling architectures. The achievement underscores the ongoing data deluge for search indexes and the engineering challenges around deduplication, politeness, and freshness.
items.summary_zh: 一个网络爬虫在大约24小时内爬取了十亿个网页，展示了分布式抓取体系的规模和效率。此成就凸显搜索索引面临的数据爆炸，以及去重、友好性与数据新鲜度等工程挑战。

items.title_zh: Show HN：Sowbot——开源硬件农用机器人（ROS2、RTK GPS）
items.summary_en: Sowbot is an open-hardware agricultural robot built with ROS2 and RTK GPS, illustrating how open robotics stacks enable field automation.

items.summary_zh: Twitch 通过广告策略尝试提高观众回归率，反映了流媒体平台的盈利与用户体验之间的权衡。

items.title_en: 100M-Row Challenge with PHP
items.title_zh: 用 PHP 实现一亿行数据挑战
items.summary_en: The 100M-Row Challenge tests PHP's data processing paths at scale, exploring memory usage, streaming versus loading, and practical tricks to handle huge datasets. The project offers benchmarks and lessons for PHP developers facing large-scale data workloads.
items.summary_zh: 100M 行挑战测试 PHP 在大规模数据处理中的内存、流式与加载策略等瓶颈，并给出提升性能的实用技巧。该项目为面向海量数据的 PHP 开发者提供基准和经验。

items.title_en: He saw an abandoned trailer, then uncovered a surveillance network

items.summary_en: An investigative piece uncovers a surveillance network connected to border patrol operations via a discarded trailer, raising concerns about oversight, privacy, and civil liberties.

items.title_en: Jane Street Hit with Terra $40B Insider Trading Suit
items.title_zh: Jane Street 因 Terra 的 400 亿美元内幕交易诉讼

items.summary_zh: Jane Street 正面临一笔与 Terra 相关的 400 亿美元内幕交易诉讼，凸显传统金融机构在加密市场中的合规挑战和潜在风险。

items.title_en: I don't know how you get here from “predict the next word”
items.title_zh: 从“预测下一个词”看不出真正的推理
items.summary_en: The piece argues that predicting the next word is not genuine reasoning or general intelligence, challenging simplistic AI benchmarks and urging deeper evaluation of models.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为仅仅“预测下一个词”并不能等同于真正的推理或通用智能，这对评估 AI 系统的能力提出了更深层的标准。

items.title_en: Ape Coding [fiction]

items.summary_en: A piece of speculative fiction exploring what happens if apes learn to code, using humor to lampoon tech culture and human bias. It riffs on creativity, tool use, and collaboration across species.
items.summary_zh: 这是一部设定性科幻短篇，设想若猿类学会编程会发生什么，用幽默讽刺科技文化与人类偏见，戏谑创造力、工具使用和跨物种协作的情景。

items.title_en: Samsung Upcycle Promise
items.title_zh: 三星 Upcycle 承诺：让旧设备再利用
items.summary_en: Samsung's Upcycle Promise extends the life of aging hardware rather than discarding it, signaling a broader push toward circular economy practices. The move could offer eco-friendly paths for consumers and opens potential new revenue streams for the company.
items.summary_zh: 三星的 Upcycle 承诺旨在延长旧设备的使用寿命，推动循环经济。此举为消费者提供更环保的升级路径，也为三星带来潜在的新收入来源。

items.title_en: ‘Viking’ was a job, not a matter of heredity: ancient DNA study (2020)
items.title_zh: ‘维京人’是职业，而非遗传决定：2020年的古DNA研究
items.summary_en: A 2020 ancient DNA study concluded that being Viking was more about the job and social role than heredity, challenging myths of a fixed genetic identity. The research emphasizes how social mobility and cultural practice shaped Viking identity.
items.summary_zh: 2020年的古DNA研究显示，成为维京人更多是职业身份而非遗传决定，这一发现打破了将维京身份简单归因于基因的神话。研究强调社会流动性与文化实践在维京人身份形成中的作用。

items.title_en: Let's discuss sandbox isolation
items.title_zh: 让我们来谈谈沙箱隔离
items.summary_en: Delivers a nuanced discussion on sandbox isolation strategies, weighing performance, compatibility, and security guarantees. It covers boundaries, provenance, and containment techniques for preventing cross-origin leaks.
items.summary_zh: 就沙箱隔离策略展开细致讨论，权衡性能、兼容性和安全性保障。涵盖边界、来源证据与防止跨域泄露的技术要点，为构建安全运行时提供参考。

items.title_en: Show HN: AI Timeline – 171 LLMs from Transformer (2017) to GPT-5.3 (2026)
items.title_zh: Show HN：AI 时间线—从 Transformer 到 GPT-5.3 的171个模型
items.summary_en: A curated timeline charts 171 LLMs from Transformer-era models (2017) through GPT-5.3 (2026), illustrating scaling, architectural shifts, and capabilities growth. It helps readers grasp the pace and trajectories of modern AI.
items.summary_zh: 该时间线梳理了从 Transformer（2017）到 GPT-5.3（2026）的171个大型语言模型，展现了规模、结构演变和能力增长的趋势，帮助读者把握AI发展的节奏与方向。

items.title_en: Allocating on the Stack
items.title_zh: 在栈上分配
items.summary_en: Explains why stack allocation can be faster and safer in many cases, and how compilers use escape analysis to decide stack vs. heap. Covers common pitfalls and practical tips for Go developers.
items.summary_zh: 解释在多数情況下栈分配为何更快更安全，以及编译器如何通过逃逸分析决定放在栈还是堆。涵盖常见坑与面向 Go 开发者的实用建议。

items.title_en: Everett shuts down Flock camera network after judge rules footage public record
items.title_zh: Everett 在法官裁定录像公开后关闭 Flock 摄像头网络
items.summary_en: A city shuts down its Flock camera network after a judge rules footage must be treated as public records. The move underscores the clash between surveillance infrastructure and transparency obligations, and invites questions about the costs and reliability of privatized camera networks for municipalities.
items.summary_zh: 在法官裁定录像应作为公共记录后，Everett 市关闭了 Flock 摄像头网络。这一举动凸显了监控基础设施与透明度义务之间的冲突，并引发关于政府采购的私有摄像头系统在成本、可靠性方面的质疑。

items.title_en: 747s and coding agents
items.title_zh: 747 与编码代理人
items.summary_en: 747s and Coding Agents draws parallels between aerospace engineering and autonomous software agents, suggesting safety, reliability, and governance patterns from aviation apply to AI agents. The essay invites designers to adopt modular, auditable architectures.
items.summary_zh: 通过对飞机工程与自动化代理的并列比较，提出将航空安全、可靠性与治理模式应用到 AI 代理设计中。倡导采用模块化、可审计的体系结构。

items.title_en: The Misuses of the University
items.title_zh: 大学的滥用
items.summary_en: A provocative examination of how universities are used by tech industry interests and political agendas, risking research integrity and the public good.
items.summary_zh: 这篇论文批评大学制度被科技产业资金与政治利益利用，可能侵蚀研究诚信和公共利益。

items.title_en: Rust is just a tool
items.title_zh: Rust 只是一个工具
items.summary_en: Argues for pragmatic Rust usage rather than dogmatic zeal, acknowledging safety benefits but balancing practicality and ecosystem maturity. Encourages treating Rust as a toolbox tool rather than a faith.
items.summary_zh: 主张务实看待 Rust，而非盲目崇拜，承认其安全性优势但强调实用性与生态成熟度的权衡。提醒把 Rust 当作工具箱中的工具，而非信仰。

items.title_en: A distributed queue in a single JSON file on object storage
items.title_zh: 在对象存储中的单一 JSON 文件实现分布式队列
items.summary_en: A practical demonstration of a distributed queue implemented in a single JSON file stored in object storage. It explores durability, concurrency, and use cases in serverless and cost-constrained environments.
items.summary_zh: 在对象存储中用一个单一的 JSON 文件实现分布式队列，探讨在无服务器和成本受限场景下的持久性与并发性挑战以及适用场景。

items.title_en: If AI writes code, should the session be part of the commit?
items.title_zh: 如果 AI 写代码，会话应该成为提交的一部分吗？
items.summary_en: As AI-assisted coding becomes common, the question arises whether interactive sessions—prompts, tool outputs, and environment state—should be captured in version control. The project discusses approaches to embedding or separating session metadata from code commits to aid reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: 随着 AI 辅助写码的普及，交互会话（提示、工具输出与环境状态）是否应被记录在版本控制中成为一个问题。该项目探讨将会话元数据嵌入提交或与代码分离的做法，以提升可复现性。

items.title_en: F-Droid Board of Directors nominations 2026
items.title_zh: 2026 年 F-Droid 董事会提名
items.summary_en: F-Droid announces its 2026 board nominations, outlining how community members can participate in governance of the open-source app store. The post signals how governance choices shape project direction and sustainability.
items.summary_zh: F-Droid 公布 2026 年董事会提名，概述社区成员如何参与开源应用商店的治理。公告强调治理决策将影响项目走向和可持续性。

items.title_en: AI is making junior devs useless
items.title_zh: AI 正在让初级开发者变得无用
items.summary_en: Opinion argues that AI-assisted coding erodes the demand for entry-level skills, prompting teams to rethink mentorship and onboarding. It warns of a hollow skill gap if juniors are not trained for higher-level tasks and critical thinking. The piece invites discussion about role evolution and education in software engineering.
items.summary_zh: 观点认为，人工智能辅助编码正在削弱对初级开发者技能的需求，促使团队重新思考指导与 onboarding。若对初学者缺乏更高层次任务与批判性思维的培训，可能形成空洞的技能差距。文章呼吁就软件工程中的角色演变与教育展开讨论。

items.title_en: λProlog: Logic programming in higher-order logic
items.title_zh: λProlog：在高阶逻辑中的逻辑编程
items.summary_en: λProlog blends higher-order logic with logic programming, enabling more expressive rules and abstractions for program verification and language research. It’s a notable approach for researchers building meta-language tools.
items.summary_zh: λProlog 将高阶逻辑与逻辑编程结合，提供更表达力的规则和抽象，适用于程序验证与语言研究。对于构建元语言工具的研究者具有重要意义。

items.title_en: Iowa farmers are leading the fight for repair
items.title_zh: 爱荷华州农民在修理权斗争中走在前线
items.summary_en: Iowa farmers are leading a repair-rights push for farm equipment, pushing back against manufacturer lock-in and repair restrictions. The movement highlights hardware freedom trends with implications for farmer costs, equipment longevity, and open repair ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 爱荷华州农民正引领修理权倡议，抵制厂商对农机的锁定与维修限制。此运动凸显硬件自由化趋势，对农民成本、设备寿命及开放修理生态系统具有深远影响。

items.title_en: Racket v9.1
items.title_zh: Racket v9.1 更新
items.summary_en: Racket v9.1 brings feature updates and bug fixes to this Scheme-family language, reinforcing its role in education and research communities.
items.summary_zh: Racket v9.1 发布了 Scheme-家族语言的更新，包含新特性与错误修正，对教育和研究社区持续有影响力。

items.title_en: Museum of Plugs and Sockets
items.title_zh: 插头与插座博物馆
items.summary_en: A virtual and physical exhibit tracing the history of plugs, sockets, and standards, highlighting regional differences, safety concerns, and the evolution of electrical hardware design.
items.summary_zh: 该博物馆汇集插头插座的历史、标准差异与区域差异，强调安全性与设计演变，以及日常硬件背后的工业与标准化故事。

items.title_en: Long Range E-Bike (2021)
items.title_zh: 长续航电动自行车
items.summary_en: The long-range e-bike article discusses a build focused on maximizing distance through larger batteries, efficient drivetrains, and weight management. It weighs the trade-offs between speed, weight, and ride comfort, offering practical guidance for real-world range gains.
items.summary_zh: 这篇关于长续航电动自行车的文章聚焦通过增大电池、高效传动与重量控制来提升续航。它权衡了速度、重量与骑行舒适度，并给出实现实际续航提升的实用建议。

items.title_en: Japanese Death Poems
items.title_zh: 日本死亡诗歌
items.summary_en: An overview of the traditional Japanese death poems (jisei), exploring how poets expressed acceptance of mortality through concise, evocative lines. The piece places these poems in cultural and historical context, highlighting their influence on literature and Zen-influenced aesthetics.
items.summary_zh: 介绍日本传统的死亡诗（死亡诗句，jisei），探讨诗人如何以简短而意境深远的句子表达对死亡的接纳。文章将这些诗作放在文化与历史语境中，突出其对文学与禅宗美学的影响。

items.title_en: Tove Jansson's criticized illustrations of The Hobbit (2023)
items.title_zh: 托芙·扬松对《霍比特人》插图的争议（2023）
items.summary_en: A retrospective look at Tove Jansson's 2023 illustrations for The Hobbit, exploring how a different artistic sensibility interacts with Tolkien's world. canonical visuals.
items.summary_zh: 回顾托芙·扬松在 2023 年为《霍比特人》所绘插图，探讨不同艺术风格如何与托尔金的世界观产生互动。文章还讨论了插图与正典视觉之间的边界及公众的评判。

items.title_en: An ode to houseplant programming (2025)
items.title_zh: Rydberg 原子从手持无线电中探测到清晰信号
items.summary_en: Researchers show Rydberg atoms can detect clear signals from a handheld radio, enabling compact, sensitive radio sensing. This opens possibilities for lightweight receivers and new quantum-enabled sensing applications.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员证明 Rydberg 原子能够从手持无线电中检测到清晰信号，带来紧凑高灵敏的射频传感能力。此技术有望推动轻量接收设备与量子感测应用的发展。

items.title_en: H-Bomb: A Frank Lloyd Wright typographic mystery
items.title_zh: H-Bomb：弗兰克·劳埃德·赖特的字体之谜
items.summary_en: Explores a typographic mystery tied to Frank Lloyd Wright, uncovering unusual letterforms and design choices linked to his architectural language. The piece shows how typography can encode a designer's worldview and invite cross-disciplinary inquiry.
items.summary_zh: 探索与 Frank Lloyd Wright 相关的字体之谜，揭示与其建筑语言相连的独特字母形态与设计选择。此探索揭示了字体如何承载设计师的世界观，并激发跨学科的思考。

items.title_en: Samsung Galaxy update removes Android recovery menu tools, including sideloading
items.title_zh: 三星 Galaxy 更新移除 Android 恢复菜单工具及 sideload 功能
items.summary_en: Notes that a firmware update removes Android recovery menu tools and sideloading, reducing capabilities for advanced users and developers to recover or customize devices.
items.summary_zh: 固件更新移除了 Android 恢复菜单工具和 sideloading，降低了高级用户和开发者对设备进行恢复或自定义的能力。

items.title_en: Hello Worg, the Org-Mode Community
items.title_zh: 你好，Worg，Org-Mode 社区
items.summary_en: Worg is the Org-mode community site with documentation, tutorials, and examples. It serves as a hub for sharing tips, workflows, and plugin setups among Emacs users.
items.summary_zh: Worg 是 Org-mode 社区的官方站点，提供文档、教程和示例，成为 Emacs 用户交流技巧、工作流与插件配置的重要枢纽。

items.title_en: Emulated Windows 3.11 in the Browser
items.title_zh: 在浏览器中仿真 Windows 3.11
items.summary_en: An in-browser emulator runs Windows 3.11, letting users experience early Windows nostalgia without external VM setups. It highlights WebAssembly-era possibilities for preserving legacy software and teaching operating-system history.
items.summary_zh: 在浏览器中运行的 Windows 3.11 模拟器让用户无需额外虚拟机即可体验早期 Windows 的怀旧，同时体现了 WebAssembly 推动下的遗留软件保存与操作系统史教育的潜力。

items.title_en: Google Street View in 2026
items.title_zh: 2026 年的 Google Street View
items.summary_en: Google Street View in 2026 shows expanded coverage, higher-quality imagery, and privacy controls, continuing to reshape how people explore places and verify locations.
items.summary_zh: 2026 年的 Google Street View 拓展覆盖、图像质量提升与隐私控制的加强，继续改变人们的地点搜索和真实性核验方式。

items.title_en: Implementing a Z80 / ZX Spectrum emulator with Claude Code
items.title_zh: 使用 Claude Code 实现干净房 Z80 / ZX Spectrum 模拟器
items.summary_en: A write-up about building a clean-room ZX Spectrum emulator with Claude Code, illustrating how AI-assisted tooling can enable faithful reimplementation without using original assets.
items.summary_zh: 介绍使用 Claude Code 构建干净房 ZX Spectrum 模拟器，展示 AI 辅助工具如何在不使用原始资产的前提下实现高保真复刻。

items.title_en: Setting up phones is a nightmare
items.title_zh: 设置新手机是一场噩梦
items.summary_en: Onboarding modern smartphones is often painful, with data migrations, sign-ins, and ecosystem lock-in slowing setup. The post catalogs friction points and suggests pragmatic improvements—better data portability, unified sign-in, and clearer transfer tooling. Reducing friction here could improve satisfaction for device makers and carriers.
items.summary_zh: 现代智能手机的初始设置常常让人倍感痛苦，数据迁移、账户登录和生态体系绑定等环节拖慢了整个设置过程。文章列出主要痛点，并建议改进方向，如更好的数据可移植性、统一登录与更清晰的迁移工具。减少这些摩擦有望提升用户满意度并惠及设备制造商与运营商。

items.title_en: New evidence that Cantor plagiarized Dedekind?
items.title_zh: 新证据指向康托尔抄袭了德德金？
items.summary_en: New evidence suggests Cantor may have drawn on Dedekind’s work, reigniting debate over priority in the foundations of set theory. The discussion reframes historical claims about originality and the evolution of infinity concepts.
items.summary_zh: 新证据指向康托尔可能借鉴了德德金的工作，再度点燃关于集合论基础中的优先权之辩。讨论重新构建了关于原创性与无穷概念演进的历史主张。

items.title_en: Palantir's AI Is Playing a Major Role in Tracking Gaza Aid Deliveries
items.title_zh: Palantir 的 AI 在追踪加沙救援物资运输中发挥重要作用
items.summary_en: Palantir’s AI plays a major role in tracking humanitarian aid deliveries in Gaza, illustrating the use of data analytics in disaster response while raising privacy and governance concerns.
items.summary_zh: Palantir 的 AI 在追踪加沙救援物资运输中扮演重要角色，展现大数据分析在人道主义物流中的潜力与挑战，包括隐私与治理问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Hacker Smacker – Spot great (and terrible) HN commenters at a glance
items.title_zh: Show HN: Hacker Smacker——一眼辨别优秀与糟糕的 HN 评论者
items.summary_en: Hacker Smacker is a show-and-tell tool that helps you spot high- and low-quality Hacker News commenters at a glance. It hints at a growing culture of audience self-regulation and tooling that helps readers filter conversations, with potential implications for signal quality and moderation.
items.summary_zh: Hacker Smacker 是一个 Show HN 项目，帮助你一眼分辨 Hacker News 评论者的优劣势。它反映出日益成熟的受众自我治理文化，以及帮助读者筛选讨论的工具，对信息质量与版面管理可能产生影响。

items.title_en: Cell Service for the Fairly Paranoid
items.title_zh: 为极度谨慎用户设计的蜂窝服务
items.summary_en: Cape offers a privacy-forward cellular service with minimal data collection and hardware protections, targeting users who want tighter control of their communications. The write-up discusses trade-offs between convenience and privacy, and what it means to entrust telecom infrastructure with sensitive data.
items.summary_zh: Cape 的 Cell Service 主打隐私导向，尽量减少数据收集并在通信中提供更强的隐私保护，面向对监控和元数据高度担忧的用户。文章讨论这类服务对日常使用、便利性与覆盖范围的权衡，以及对电信基础设施信任的挑战。

items.title_en: An autopsy of AI-generated 3D slop
items.title_zh: AI 生成的 3D 内容质量评析
items.summary_en: An autopsy of AI-generated 3D slop critiques the quality issues in AI-created 3D assets, examining artifacts and suggesting improvements in data, training, and evaluation for 3D workflows.
items.summary_zh: AI 生成的 3D 内容质量评析揭示存在的缺陷、勘误与改进空间，呼吁在数据、训练和评估方面做出更严谨的设计。

items.title_en: Tell HN: MitID, Denmark's digital ID, was down
items.title_zh: 丹麦数字身份 MitID 宕机了
items.summary_en: MitID, Denmark's digital ID, experienced an outage, highlighting the fragility and resilience challenges of national ID systems. The incident sparked questions about redundancy, user impact, and uptime guarantees for critical digital infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 丹麦数字身份 MitID 发生宕机，暴露了国家级数字身份系统的脆弱性与韧性挑战。事件引发对冗余设计、用户影响与关键信息基础设施稳定性的讨论。

items.title_en: femtolisp: A lightweight, robust, scheme-like Lisp implementation
items.title_zh: femtolisp：一种轻量、稳健的 Scheme 风格 Lisp 实现
items.summary_en: femtolisp is a compact Lisp implementation inspired by Scheme, prioritizing small footprint and robust semantics for embedding or experimentation. It offers a pleasant sandbox for language enthusiasts to explore Lisp VM design.
items.summary_zh: femtolisp 是一个受 Scheme 启发的轻量 Lisp 实现，关注极小体积与稳健语义，适合嵌入式场景和语言实验。为语言爱好者提供了一个探索 Lisp 虚拟机设计的便携环境。

items.title_en: Interview with Øyvind Kolås, GIMP developer (2017)
items.title_zh: GIMP 开发者 Øyvind Kolås 专访
items.summary_en: Øyvind Kolås shares his views on GIMP, its design philosophy, and the project’s evolving feature set. The interview sheds light on open source graphics tooling, community governance, and sustaining long-running projects in a dynamic ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Øyvind Kolås 分享了对 GIMP 的看法、设计理念以及日益发展的功能集。访谈揭示了开源图形工具、社区治理，以及在快速变化的生态中维持长期项目的挑战与策略。

items.title_en: Show HN: Babyshark – Wireshark made easy (terminal UI for PCAPs)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Babyshark——为PCAP提供更易用的 Wireshark 终端界面
items.summary_en: Babyshark delivers a terminal UI for PCAP analysis, making packet inspection accessible without a GUI. This Show HN project could accelerate quick network investigations for developers and security researchers alike.
items.summary_zh: Babyshark 提供一个 PCAP 分析的终端界面，让在无 GUI 的环境下也能进行数据包查看。该 Show HN 项目可能提升开发者与安全研究者的排查效率。

items.title_en: Why the KeePass format should be based on SQLite
items.title_zh: KeePass 格式为何应基于 SQLite
items.summary_en: Advocating for SQLite as KeePass's storage backend to improve portability, indexing, and concurrency. The argument weighs simplicity and compatibility against KeePass's existing formats and security model.
items.summary_zh: 将 KeePass 的存储后端改用 SQLite 可以提升可移植性、索引能力与并发性能。此论点在简化性、兼容性与 KeePass 现有格式及安全模型之间权衡。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Cardboard (YC W26) – Agentic video editor
items.title_zh: Cardboard（YC W26）— 具备代理能力的视频编辑工具
items.summary_en: Cardboard positions itself as an agentic video editor, automating parts of the editing workflow with AI-like capabilities. It promises faster turnaround and smarter automation, while raising questions about reliability, creative control, and data privacy in AI-assisted video work.
items.summary_zh: Cardboard 将自己定位为具备代理能力的视频编辑工具，能够在编辑工作流中自动化部分任务，并具备智能化能力。它承诺更快的产出与更智能的自动化，但也引发关于可靠性、创作控制与数据隐私的讨论。

items.title_en: Show HN: I ported Manim to TypeScript (run 3b1B math animations in the browser)
items.title_zh: Show HN：将 Manim 移植到 TypeScript，在浏览器中运行 3Blue1Brown 的数学动画
items.summary_en: Porting Manim to TypeScript enables browser-based math animations without Python tooling. The project demonstrates bridging a Python-centric toolchain into the web, enabling interactive educational content and broader accessibility.
items.summary_zh: 将 Manim 移植到 TypeScript 使浏览器无需 Python 即可渲染数学动画，展示了把以 Python 为中心的工具链移植到前端的可行性。这一努力有望推动互动教育内容的普及与可访问性。

items.title_en: Half million 'Words with Spaces' missing from dictionaries
items.title_zh: 半百万个带空格的词汇未被字典收录
items.summary_en: A linguistics resource notes hundreds of thousands of space-containing words are missing from dictionaries, impacting spell checkers, search, and NLP tools. The post argues for expanding lexical databases and better normalization for multilingual and hyphenated terms.
items.summary_zh: 一份语言学资源指出有数十万带空格的词汇未被字典收录，这会影响拼写检查、搜索以及自然语言处理工具。文章呼吁扩展词库并改进多语言与带连字符词汇的正规化处理。

items.title_en: Why isn't LA repaving streets?
items.title_zh: 为什么洛杉矶没有重新铺路？
items.summary_en: The piece explains why LA's street repaving has lagged, citing funding constraints, bureaucratic hurdles, and prioritization choices. It highlights the broader challenges of urban infrastructure maintenance in large cities.
items.summary_zh: 文章解释了洛杉矶街道为何长期未铺设更新，归因于资金不足、繁琐的程序和优先级决策等因素，反映大城市基础设施维护的普遍挑战。

items.title_en: The Future of AI
items.title_zh: 人工智能的未来
items.summary_en: AI is poised to keep expanding in capability and reach, unlocking productivity gains as models become more integrated into everyday tooling. At the same time, governance, safety, and ethical considerations will intensify, demanding clear alignment and responsible deployment.
items.summary_zh: 人工智能的未来将继续显著扩展，模型越发融入日常工具，推动生产力提升。与此同时，治理、安全与伦理议题将变得更加关键，需要明确的对齐机制和负责任的部署。

items.title_en: From Noise to Image – interactive guide to diffusion
items.title_zh: 从噪声到图像——扩散模型的交互指南
items.summary_en: From Noise to Image provides an interactive tour of diffusion models, showing how random noise evolves into coherent images. The guide helps learners visualize the mechanics behind modern generative AI.
items.summary_zh: 提供扩散模型的互动式演示，展示随机噪声如何逐步形成清晰图像，帮助学习者直观理解现代生成模型的工作原理。

items.title_en: Learnings from 4 months of Image-Video VAE experiments
items.title_zh: 四个月的影像—视频 VAE 实验的收获
items.summary_en: Four months of image-video VAE experiments reveal that optimizing for reconstruction can come at the expense of high-quality generation, and vice versa. The notes distill practical takeaways on model design, training regimes, and evaluation for image/video VAEs.
items.summary_zh: 四个月的影像与视频变分自编码器实验表明，优化重建质量往往以牺牲生成质量为代价，反之亦然。笔记归纳了模型设计、训练策略与评估方法的实用要点，帮助研究者在图像/视频 VAE 任务中取舍。

items.title_en: Why is the first C++ (m)allocation always 72 KB?
items.title_zh: 为什么第一次的 C++ 内存分配总是 72 KB？
items.summary_en: Exploring the initial memory allocation in C++ reveals allocator design, page alignment, and arena behavior. The observation matters because the first allocation can influence startup latency and fragmentation, shaping optimization choices for allocators and data layout.
items.summary_zh: 探究 C++ 首次内存分配为何常见为 72 KB，揭示分配器设计、页面对齐与内存区的行为。此现象会影响启动延迟与碎片化，从而引导开发者在分配器与内存布局上的优化选择。

items.title_en: The Physics and Economics of Moving 44 Tonnes at 56mph
items.title_zh: 以56 mph 搬运44吨货物的物理与经济学
items.summary_en: The piece breaks down the physics and economics of moving 44-tonnes at 56 mph, covering traction, braking, stability, and cost implications of heavy-haul logistics.
items.summary_zh: 文章解析以 56 mph 搬运 44 吨货物的物理与经济学，涵盖牵引、制动、稳定性及重载运输的成本影响。

items.title_en: "Just a little detail that wouldn't sell anything"
items.title_zh: 只是一个微小的细节，不会卖出任何东西
items.summary_en: Just a little detail that wouldn't sell anything discusses how tiny UX, pricing or product choices can disproportionately influence user behavior and perceived value, even when they seem marginal. The piece argues against neglecting micro-details in product design.
items.summary_zh: 只是一个微小的细节，不会卖出任何东西讨论了微小的用户体验、定价或产品选择如何在不显眼的地方显著影响用户行为与感知价值。文章强调在产品设计中不能忽视这些微小细节。

items.title_en: Show HN: Django Control Room – All Your Tools Inside the Django Admin
items.title_zh: Show HN：Django Control Room——将所有工具整合到 Django Admin 中
items.summary_en: Django Control Room consolidates development and admin tooling inside a single Django admin interface, streamlining workflows for Django projects. By bringing utilities like dashboards, task runners, and configs into the admin, it reduces context switching for developers and operators.
items.summary_zh: Django Control Room 将开发与管理工具集中在一个 Django Admin 界面中，简化 Django 项目的工作流。把仪表板、任务执行、配置管理等工具整合在 Admin 内，降低开发与运维的切换成本。

items.title_en: Linuxulator on FreeBSD Feels Like Magic
items.title_zh: FreeBSD 上的 Linuxulator 给人魔法般的体验
items.summary_en: Linuxulator provides Linux ABI compatibility on FreeBSD, letting Linux binaries run on FreeBSD almost seamlessly. The post shares surprising ease of use and performance characteristics, highlighting FreeBSD's continued relevance for developers who want Linux compatibility.
items.summary_zh: Linuxulator 为 FreeBSD 提供 Linux 二进制接口兼容性，使常见 Linux 应用几乎无缝在 FreeBSD 上运行。文中分享了令人惊喜的易用性与性能表现，凸显 FreeBSD 在寻求 Linux 兼容性开发者中的持续价值。

items.title_en: Reading English from 1000 AD
items.title_zh: 从公元1000年开始阅读英语
items.summary_en: An exploration of English-language material around 1000 AD, with notes on language features, script, and how scholars reconstruct pronunciation from scarce sources.
items.summary_zh: 探索公元1000年前后的英语文本，涵盖语言特征、书写体系，以及学者如何从稀缺文本中推断发音。

items.title_en: Show HN: 3D Mahjong, Built in CSS
items.title_zh: Show HN：用 CSS 构建的 3D 麻将
items.summary_en: A Show HN project demonstrates 3D Mahjong rendered with pure CSS, showcasing how far CSS transforms and perspective can push browser rendering without heavy WebGL. The build serves as both a playful demo and a reference for CSS-driven 3D layouts. It hints at potential performance and accessibility tradeoffs for CSS-only approaches.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个 Show HN 项目，展示了用纯 CSS 实现的 3D 麻将。它展示了 CSS 变换和透视在无需 WebGL 的情况下实现 3D 的潜力。该作品既是趣味演示，也为 CSS 驱动的 3D 布局提供参考，同时提示了在纯 CSS 方法下的性能与可访问性取舍。

items.title_en: 80386 Protection
items.summary_en: Delves into the 80386’s protection features, explaining how the 32-bit protected mode, segmentation, and paging laid the groundwork for modern OS memory safety. It highlights historical challenges and practical lessons for systems programming.
items.summary_zh: 回顾80386时代的保护机制，解说32位保护模式、分段和分页如何奠定现代操作系统的内存安全基础，指出历史挑战及给系统编程的启示。 这些经验对理解后续的虚拟内存和安全架构仍有借鉴意义。

items.title_en: Robust and efficient quantum-safe HTTPS
items.title_zh: 稳健高效的量子安全 HTTPS
items.summary_en: Efforts to deploy quantum-resistant cryptography in TLS aim to future-proof web traffic without sacrificing performance. The discussion covers practical strategies, standards progress, and deployment considerations for quantum-safe HTTPS.
items.summary_zh: 在 TLS 中引入对量子攻击的抵御能力，力求在不牺牲性能的前提下实现量子抗性。讨论涵盖实际策略、标准进展以及量子安全 HTTPS 的部署要点。

items.title_en: Qt45: A small polymerase ribozyme that can synthesize itself
items.title_zh: Qt45：一种能自我合成的聚合酶核糖酶
items.summary_en: Qt45 is a compact polymerase ribozyme capable of self-synthesis, a striking example of minimal biochemical self-replication. The finding fuels discussions about origins-of-life hypotheses and synthetic biology, while prompting biosafety and governance considerations for powerful self-replicating systems.
items.summary_zh: Qt45 是一种能够自我合成的聚合酶核糖酶，展现了自我复制的极简生化能力。该发现为起源理论与合成生物学的讨论提供新材料，同时也引发对潜在自我复制系统的生物安全与治理关注。

items.title_en: Vibe coded Lovable-hosted app littered with basic flaws exposed 18K users
items.title_zh: Vibe 编写的 Lovable 托管应用充斥着基础缺陷，影响 1.8 万用户
items.summary_en: Vibe-coded Lovable-hosted app exposed basic flaws affecting about 18,000 users, highlighting how even polished apps can overlook core security and how user trust hinges on sound security practices.
items.summary_zh: 由 Vibe 开发并托管的 Lovable 应用暴露了多处基础缺陷，影响大约 1.8 万用户，凸显即使看似完善的应用也可能忽视核心安全，用户信任依赖于稳健的安全实践。

items.title_en: Show HN: Unfucked - version all changes (by any tool) - local-first/source avail
items.title_zh: Show HN：Unfucked——以任意工具记录所有变更的版本历史，本地优先，源代码可用
items.summary_en: Unfucked offers a system to version all changes across tools with a local-first design and available source. It aims to unify change history across disparate tooling, enabling offline-first workflows and open-source collaboration.
items.summary_zh: Unfucked 提供一个将跨工具的所有变更版本化的系统，采用本地优先设计并提供源代码。该项目旨在统一不同工具间的变更历史，支持离线优先的工作流和开源协作。

items.title_en: Show HN: Deff – Side-by-side Git diff review in your terminal
items.title_zh: Deff：在终端中进行并排 Git diff 审阅
items.summary_en: Deff brings side-by-side Git diff reviewing to the terminal, streamlining code reviews and increasing readability for terminal-first workflows. It helps developers quickly compare changes without leaving the command line, boosting productivity.
items.summary_zh: Deff 将并排的 Git diff 审阅带到终端，简化代码评审并提升命令行工作流的可读性。开发者无需离开命令行就能快速对比改动，从而提升生产力。

items.title_en: Netflix Backs Out of Warner Bros. Bidding, Paramount Set to Win
items.title_zh: Netflix 放弃对 Warner Bros 的出价，派拉蒙预计获胜
items.summary_en: Netflix withdraws from Warner Bros bidding, paving Paramount to win the package. The move underscores shifting dynamics in studio licensing and content strategy among major platforms.
items.summary_zh: Netflix 从对华纳兄弟的竞标中撤出，为派拉蒙赢得交易铺平道路，凸显大型平台在版权与内容策略上的竞争格局变化。

items.title_en: Just-bash: Bash for Agents
items.title_zh: just-bash：面向代理的 Bash
items.summary_en: Just-bash brings Bash scripting to AI agents, allowing commands and tool calls to be orchestrated from a shell. It lowers the barrier to building simple, scriptable agents and demonstrates a pragmatic approach to tool integration.
items.summary_zh: Just-bash 将 Bash 脚本用于 AI 代理，使命令和工具调用可从 shell 进行编排，降低了构建可脚本化代理的门槛，并展示了工具整合的务实路径。

items.title_en: Dissecting the CPU-memory relationship in garbage collection (OpenJDK 26)
items.title_zh: 分解垃圾回收中的 CPU 与内存关系（OpenJDK 26）
items.summary_en: A close look at how garbage collectors trade CPU work for memory efficiency in OpenJDK 26, detailing how different GC strategies affect latency, throughput, and heap pressure. The discussion helps JVM users understand tuning choices for memory-heavy applications.
items.summary_zh: 深入分析 OpenJDK 26 中垃圾回收如何以 CPU 工作换取内存效率，阐述不同 GC 策略对延迟、吞吐和堆压力的影响，帮助 JVM 用户在内存密集型应用中做出更明智的调优选择。

items.title_en: The quixotic team trying to build a world in a 20-year-old game
items.title_zh: 在一款20年老游戏里拼凑一个完整世界的狂热团队
items.summary_en: Ars Technica profiles a team building a living, sprawling world inside a 20-year-old game, highlighting the technical and cultural challenges of modding, world-building, and community engagement. The project illuminates retro game preservation and the enduring appeal of sandbox environments.
items.summary_zh: Ars Technica 介绍一个团队在一款20年历史的游戏中构建一个生动的、庞大的世界，揭示了模组、世界观构建及社区参与中的技术与文化挑战。此举凸显了对复古游戏的保护与沙盒式玩法的持久魅力。

items.title_en: Little Free Library
items.title_zh: 小型免费图书馆
items.summary_en: Little Free Library operates tiny, volunteer-run book exchanges that foster community literacy and sharing. The initiative highlights how these micro-libraries expand access to books and empower neighbors to curate their collections.
items.summary_zh: Little Free Library 以志愿者运营的微型书交换点促进社区读写与共享。这一倡议展示了这些微型图书馆如何扩展阅读资源并提升邻里自治与参与感。

items.title_en: Stripe reportedly makes offer to acquire PayPal
items.title_zh: Stripe 或拟收购 PayPal
items.summary_en: A possible Stripe bid to acquire PayPal would merge two large payments ecosystems, potentially reshaping consumer wallets, merchant onboarding, and cross-border rails. The move could invite regulatory scrutiny and spur strategic shifts in fintech competition.
items.summary_zh: 据传 Stripe 正寻求收购 PayPal，这将整合两大支付生态系统，可能重塑消费者钱包、商家接入和跨境支付网络。此举可能引发监管关注，并推动金融科技领域的战略调整。

items.title_en: Cash issuing terminals
items.title_zh: 现金发行终端
items.summary_en: Cash issuing terminals are the hardware backbone of ATMs, handling secure cash dispensing and value loading.
items.summary_zh: 现金发行终端是 ATM 的核心硬件，负责安全的出钞与现金充值。文章探讨了这类设备的安全性、维护与更新，以及在现金使用下降、数字支付兴起的背景下的现代化挑战与潜在漏洞。

items.title_en: OpenAI reaches deal to deploy AI models on U.S. DoW classified network
items.title_zh: OpenAI 就在美国战争部机密网络部署 AI 模型达成协议
items.summary_en: OpenAI clinches a deal to deploy AI models inside the Department of War's classified network, signaling deeper government use of advanced AI with secure integrations. The arrangement highlights tensions between rapid AI adoption and governance, oversight, and cybersecurity requirements. It could set a precedent for other agencies and vendors negotiating access to restricted networks.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 与战争部在机密网络中部署 AI 模型达成协议，标志着对先进 AI 的政府级别更深度应用与安全集成。该安排凸显快速采用 AI 与治理、监管及网络安全要求之间的张力，也可能为其他机构和厂商就进入受限网络的谈判设定先例。

items.title_en: Sprites on the Web
items.title_zh: 网页上的精灵图
items.summary_en: Sprites on the Web offers practical guidance on when to use sprite sheets, SVG sprites, or modern animation techniques. The piece weighs performance trade-offs and helps developers choose strategies that balance fidelity and load times.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在网页上使用精灵图的实用方法，讨论何时选用精灵表、SVG 精灵，以及现代动画技术，并权衡性能与画质、加载速度之间的关系。

items.title_en: Show HN: Timber – Ollama for classical ML models, 336x faster than Python
items.title_zh: Show HN：Timber——用 Ollama 运行经典 ML 模型，速度比 Python 快 336 倍
items.summary_en: Timber leverages Ollama to run classical ML models, claiming a remarkable 336x speedup over Python-based runtimes. This approach highlights how local, lean inference pipelines can outperform traditional Python stacks for certain workloads.
items.summary_zh: Timber 借助 Ollama 运行经典机器学习模型，声称相比 Python 运行时实现了高达 336 倍的加速。这一思路凸显了本地、精简推理流水线在某些工作负载上的潜在领先性。

items.title_en: Bootc and OSTree: Modernizing Linux System Deployment
items.title_zh: Bootc 与 OSTree：现代化 Linux 系统部署
items.summary_en: OSTree enables atomic, versioned system deployments, and Bootc offers a streamlined boot process to tie deployments together. The combination simplifies updates, rollbacks, and reproducibility on Linux devices, with particular appeal for edge and embedded systems.
items.summary_zh: OSTree 实现原子性、逐版本的系统部署，Bootc 为引导流程提供简化的整合。二者结合使 Linux 设备的更新、回滚与可重复性变得更简单，特别适用于边缘与嵌入式系统。

items.title_en: Show HN: Clocksimulator.com – A minimalist, distraction-free analog clock
items.title_zh: Show HN：Clocksimulator.com——极简、无干扰的模拟钟表
items.summary_en: Clocksimulator.com offers a distraction-free analog clock UI that focuses on minimalism and performance. It demonstrates how a tiny, focused web app can deliver a pleasant, distraction-free utility without feature bloat.
items.summary_zh: Clocksimulator.com 提供一个极简、无干扰的模拟时钟界面，强调设计简洁和响应速度。这个项目展示了一个小而专注的网页应用如何在不堆叠功能的情况下提供高质量的实用体验。

items.title_en: Turing Completeness of GNU find
items.title_zh: GNU find 的图灵完备性
items.summary_en: A study argues that GNU find, via its expression language and -exec capabilities, can simulate a Turing machine, illustrating surprising computational power in utility programs. This challenges assumptions about what counts as a programming language and has implications for esolangs and scriptability.
items.summary_zh: 研究表明 GNU find 通过表达式语言和 -exec 等特性，具备模拟图灵机的能力，揭示了实用工具的意外计算能力。这对把何者算作编程语言的认知提出挑战，并影响对极简语言和可脚本性的理解。

items.title_en: I rendered 1,418 confusables over 230 fonts. Most aren't confusable to the eye
items.title_zh: 我在 230 种字体中渲染了 1,418 个混淆符号：大多数并不肉眼混淆
items.summary_en: A study visualizing glyph confusability across 230 fonts found that most potential confusions are not visually obvious to the eye, challenging assumptions in font design and OCR. The results underscore the complexity of visual similarity beyond simple glyph shapes.
items.summary_zh: 一项对230种字体中的1418个潜在混淆字符的可视化分析显示，大多数并不会在肉眼上产生直观混淆，挑战了字体设计和光学字符识别中的直观假设。这表明视觉相似性远比简单字形要复杂。

items.title_en: Using the new bridges of FreeBSD 15
items.title_zh: 使用 FreeBSD 15 的新桥接功能
items.summary_en: FreeBSD 15's new bridging features enable simpler, more powerful network setups, with practical notes on configuring bridges, performance considerations, and potential use cases.
items.summary_zh: FreeBSD 15 的新桥接功能让网络配置更简单、强大，文章给出实际的配置要点、性能考量与潜在应用场景。

items.title_en: Why does C have the best file API
items.title_zh: 为何 C 拥有最佳的文件 API
items.summary_en: C’s file API offers low-level control, portability, and predictable behavior that shine in systems programming. The piece argues these attributes persist as advantages despite modern higher-level alternatives, with direct OS interaction and a simple, consistent interface. The trade-off is safety and ergonomics, but for certain domains, the API remains unmatched.
items.summary_zh: C 的文件 I/O 原语提供了底层控制、可移植性和可预测性，这使其在系统编程中仍然出色。文章认为尽管出现了更高层次的替代方案，这些特性仍然是其优势，原因在于直接的操作系统交互和简单统一的接口。代价是安全性和易用性，但在特定领域，C 的 API 仍然无人能及。

items.title_en: Denver dumps Flock, awards contract to Axon
items.title_zh: 丹佛取消 Flock，改签 Axon 合同
items.summary_en: Denver dumps Flock surveillance cameras and awards a contract to Axon, signaling a shift in public safety tech vendors. The move spotlights ongoing debates about surveillance governance, costs, and civil liberties.
items.summary_zh: 丹佛宣布取消使用 Flock 的监控摄像系统并将合同授予 Axon，显示出公共安全领域对供应商的再选择。此举再度凸显对监控治理、成本与公民自由的持续讨论。

items.title_en: Parakeet.cpp – Parakeet ASR inference in pure C++ with Metal GPU acceleration
items.title_zh: Parakeet.cpp：纯 C++ 的 Parakeet ASR 推理，使用 Metal GPU 加速
items.summary_en: Parakeet.cpp is a pure-C++ ASR inference engine accelerated by Apple's Metal GPU, enabling faster on-device speech recognition without Python bindings. It highlights performance characteristics, API design, and potential use cases for iOS/macOS developers.
items.summary_zh: Parakeet.cpp 是一个用纯 C++ 编写、借助 Apple Metal GPU 加速的语音识别推理引擎，支持在设备端实现更快的识别。它强调了性能特性、API 设计以及对 iOS/macOS 开发者的潜在应用场景。

items.title_en: Writing a Guide to SDF Fonts
items.title_zh: 关于SDF字体的指南
items.summary_en: Red Blob Games lays out a practical guide to signed distance field (SDF) fonts, covering how SDFs enable scalable, high-quality rendering, tips for generating fonts, and common pitfalls. The guide helps developers implement crisp text at multiple scales in games and UI.
items.summary_zh: Red Blob Games 提供了关于 Signed Distance Field（SDF）字体的实用指南，讲解SDF如何实现可扩展且高质量的文本渲染、字体生成要点以及常见坑。对游戏和 UI 的多尺度文本渲染尤为有用。

items.title_en: Decided to fly to the US to buy some hard drives
items.title_zh: 决定飞往美国购买硬盘
items.summary_en: A personal post about flying to the US to buy hard drives, reflecting on supply-chain frictions, pricing, and the lengths enthusiasts go to for storage.
items.summary_zh: 一则个人帖子讲述因硬盘短缺而飞赴美国采购的经历，反映了供应链摩擦、价格波动以及存储爱好者为获取硬件所走的极端路径。

items.title_en: VTT Test Donut Lab Battery Reaches 80% Charge in Under 10 Minutes [pdf]
items.title_zh: VTT 测试圆环形电池在10分钟内充至80%
items.summary_en: VTT's donut-shaped lab battery reaches 80% charge in under 10 minutes, signaling progress in fast charging tech. The result highlights potential gains for EV charging and battery design, while noting scale-up and efficiency questions.
items.summary_zh: VTT 的圆环形实验室电池在不到10分钟内充到80%，展示快速充电技术的进展。该结果可能推动电动汽车充电与电池设计的潜在改进，但大规模生产与能量密度仍需验证。

items.title_en: Fresh File Explorer – VS Code extension for navigating recent work
items.title_zh: Fresh File Explorer：VS Code 的最近工作导航扩展
items.summary_en: Fresh File Explorer is a VS Code extension designed to speed up navigation by exposing recent files and work sessions in an accessible panel. It reduces context-switching and helps developers jump back into work faster. The extension demonstrates a shift toward more ergonomic, task-focused tooling inside editors.
items.summary_zh: Fresh File Explorer 是一个 VS Code 扩展，旨在通过展示最近的文件和工作会话来提升导航效率。它可以减少上下文切换，帮助开发者更快回到正在做的事。这一扩展体现了编辑器内更注重任务导向的工具设计趋势。

items.title_en: Hardwood: A New Parser for Apache Parquet
items.title_zh: Hardwood：Apache Parquet 的全新解析器
items.summary_en: Hardwood introduces a new parser for Apache Parquet designed to improve parsing speed and resilience relative to existing implementations. It focuses on robust handling of the Parquet metadata and nested schemas, with potential for streaming reads and better ergonomics for developers integrating Parquet data into pipelines. This could influence data tooling performance in analytics stacks that rely on Parquet.
items.summary_zh: Hardwood 为 Apache Parquet 提供了一种全新的解析器，目标是提升解析速度与容错能力。它强调对 Parquet 元数据和嵌套模式的稳健处理，并可能支持流式读取，方便将 Parquet 数据接入数据管线。此举可能提升分析栈中 Parquet 相关工具的性能与可用性。

items.title_en: Aesthetics of single threading
items.title_zh: 单线程的美学
items.summary_en: Single-threaded design is advocated for its predictability and simplicity in certain workloads, resisting the lure of ever-more complex concurrency. The piece argues that elegance can reside in serial execution when it matches the problem domain.
items.summary_zh: 单线程设计在某些工作负载下因可预测性与简洁性而受青睐，避免过度追求并发带来的复杂性。文章认为，串行执行在匹配问题域时也能展现优雅。

items.title_en: Modeling cycles of grift with evolutionary game theory
items.title_zh: 用进化博弈论建模骗局循环
items.summary_en: Using evolutionary game theory, the post models cycles of grifters, skeptics, and marks to show why scams persist and how defenders might disrupt them. It highlights dynamics of trust, deception, and countermeasures.
items.summary_zh: 通过进化博弈论建模诈骗者、怀疑者与受害者之间的互动周期，揭示骗局为何持续存在以及防御方如何打破循环，强调信任、欺骗与对策的动态。

items.title_en: Right-sizes LLM models to your system's RAM, CPU, and GPU
items.title_zh: 把大语言模型按系统 RAM、CPU 与 GPU 的容量进行合适调优
items.summary_en: A practical approach to tailoring large language models to available hardware using tools like llmfit. It helps users fit models to memory and compute constraints, enabling more affordable local inference.
items.summary_zh: 提供一种利用 llmfit 等工具将大语言模型按可用硬件进行尺寸自适应的实用方法，帮助在受限的内存和算力条件下实现更经济的本地推理。

items.title_en: The real cost of random I/O
items.title_zh: 随机 I/O 的真实成本
items.summary_en: Random I/O incurs far higher latency than sequential access due to seeks and cache behavior. The analysis shows how random patterns translate into higher CPU and I/O costs, influencing database design and storage expectations.
items.summary_zh: 随机 I/O 相比顺序访问带来更高的延迟，原因在于寻道和缓存行为。分析显示随机模式如何转化为更高的 CPU 与 I/O 成本，影响数据库设计与存储预期。

items.title_en: An Introduction to the Codex Seraphinianus, the Strangest Book Ever Published
items.title_zh: 《塞拉菲尼亚努斯手抄本》：有史以来最怪异的书籍导读
items.summary_en: The Codex Seraphinianus is a 20th-century illustrated encyclopedia written in an invented script with surreal drawings. This introduction covers its creation, structure, and enduring mystique, illustrating how an unreadable text can inspire art, curiosity, and design.
items.summary_zh: 《塞拉菲尼亚努斯手抄本》是二十世纪以虚构文字创作的超现实百科全书，配有离奇插图。本文介绍其创作背景、结构与持续的神秘感，展示未解读文本如何激发艺术、好奇心与设计灵感。

items.title_en: Justifying Text-Wrap: Pretty
items.title_zh: 文本换行对齐：美观排版
items.summary_en: Justifying text wrap explores how layout decisions affect readability and aesthetics beyond pure line-breaking. It argues for careful justification strategies—balancing ragged edges, hyphenation, and column width to produce pleasing, legible text on screens and print.
items.summary_zh: 文本换行的对齐设计从可读性与美观出发，讨论如何在行断、连字符和列宽之间取得平衡。对屏幕和印刷排版中的文本美感提供了实践性建议。

items.title_en: Pentagon chief blocks officers from Ivy League schools and top universities
items.title_zh: 五角大楼主管阻止军官就读常春藤等一流大学
items.summary_en: The Pentagon chief restricts officers' participation in education partnerships with Ivy League and top universities as AI and space programs expand, potentially reshaping professional development pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 国防部部长在 AI 与太空项目扩张背景下，限制军官参与常春藤及顶尖大学的教育合作伙伴关系，可能改变职业发展渠道。

items.title_en: Benchmarks for concurrent hash map implementations in Go
items.title_zh: Go 并发哈希映射实现基准测试
items.summary_en: A benchmarking study compares different concurrent map implementations in Go, highlighting trade-offs between speed, memory, and simplicity. It helps library authors and high-throughput apps choose the right data structure.
items.summary_zh: 基准测试比较了 Go 的多种并发哈希映射实现，揭示了速度、内存和实现复杂度之间的权衡。为开源库作者与高吞吐应用选择合适的数据结构提供参考。

items.title_en: How the Government Deceived Congress in the Debate over Surveillance Powers (2013)
items.title_zh: 政府在2013年监控权限辩论中对国会的误导
items.summary_en: A retrospective on how intelligence leadership used selective language to sway congressional debates over surveillance powers in 2013. The piece exposes misstatements and framing tactics that shaped policy outcomes. It underscores the need for precise, truth-driven oversight in national security discussions.
items.summary_zh: 回顾2013年的监控权限辩论中，情报机构如何通过选择性用语来左右国会意见。文章揭露了误导性陈述与话术策略如何影响政策走向，并强调在国家安全议题中实现精准、以事实为基础的监督的必要性。

items.title_en: Story of XZ Backdoor [video]
items.title_zh: XZ Backdoor 故事（视频）
items.summary_en: A video documentary traces the XZ backdoor incident, explaining how the backdoor operated and what defenders can learn from the incident. It spotlights supply chain and firmware security lessons for modern devices.
items.summary_zh: 一段视频梳理 XZ 后门事件，解释后门如何运作，以及对防御方的教训，强调供应链与固件安全在现代设备中的要点。

items.title_en: Red Hat takes on Docker Desktop with its enterprise Podman Desktop build
items.title_zh: Red Hat 用企业版 Podman Desktop 与 Docker Desktop 竞争
items.summary_en: Red Hat unveils enterprise Podman Desktop, positioning it as a Docker Desktop alternative with integrated enterprise features, Kubernetes support, and a focus on rootless containers. The move signals a shift toward more secure, daemonless workflows in enterprise dev environments.
items.summary_zh: Red Hat 推出企业版 Podman Desktop，定位为 Docker Desktop 的替代方案，集成企业级特性、Kubernetes 支持，并聚焦于无守护进程的容器工作流。这一举动预示着企业开发环境将朝更安全、无守护进程的方向发展。

items.title_en: Sub-second volumetric 3D printing by synthesis of holographic light fields
items.title_zh: 亚秒级体积三维打印：通过全息光场合成实现
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate sub-second volumetric 3D printing by synthesizing holographic light fields that encode an entire object in a single exposure. By projecting a carefully designed holographic light field, the resin cures in three dimensions without layer-by-layer scanning, enabling ultra-fast fabrication of complex geometries. The method hinges on precise light-field control and rapid image synthesis hardware.
items.summary_zh: 研究通过全息光场的合成来实现亚秒级的体积打印，将整个三维对象在单次曝光中编码到光场中。避免传统逐层打印的过程，利用高精度光场控制实现复杂几何体的超快速制造。该技术若实现规模化的材料和硬件兼容性，可能彻底改变快速原型制作与按需制造的速度与灵活性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Claude-File-Recovery, recover files from your ~/.claude sessions
items.title_zh: Claude 文件恢复工具，能从 ~/.claude 会话中恢复文件
items.summary_en: Claude-File-Recovery is an open-source tool that extracts and recovers files from your ~/.claude sessions, helping you salvage data if a session drops, is interrupted, or if you need to retrieve drafts. It demonstrates a practical approach to user data resilience in AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: Claude-File-Recovery 是一个开源工具，能从你的 ~/.claude 会话中提取并恢复文件，帮助在会话中断或意外丢失时找回草稿数据。它展示了在 AI 工作流中提升数据韧性的切实做法。

items.title_en: Cardiorespiratory fitness is associated with lower anger and anxiety
items.title_zh: 心肺耐力与较低的愤怒和焦虑相关
items.summary_en: A study finds higher cardiorespiratory fitness is associated with lower anger and anxiety. The result adds to evidence that physical conditioning supports mental health and implications for treatment and public health messaging.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现，心肺耐力水平越高，愤怒与焦虑越低。这为体能训练对心理健康的积极作用提供了证据，可能影响治疗建议和公共卫生宣传。

items.title_en: Understanding the Go Runtime: The Memory Allocator
items.title_zh: 理解 Go 运行时：内存分配器
items.summary_en: This explainer covers how Go's runtime allocates memory, including allocator strategies, interaction with the garbage collector, and the resulting performance implications for real-time apps.
items.summary_zh: 本文解析 Go 运行时如何进行内存分配，涵盖分配器策略、与垃圾回收的耦合，以及对实时应用性能的影响。

items.title_en: You don't have to
items.title_zh: 你不必
items.summary_en: Argues against over-optimizing or over-engineering early stages; advocates pragmatic delivery and incremental improvements in software development.
items.summary_zh: 主张在初期不必过度优化或过度设计，提倡务实交付与渐进式改进的软件开发方法。

items.title_en: Writers and Their Day Jobs
items.title_zh: 作家及其日常工作
items.summary_en: Writers and Their Day Jobs examines how authors balance regular work with writing life, and how ordinary jobs shape voice, themes, and discipline.
items.summary_zh: 《作家及其日常工作》探讨作者如何在日常工作与写作之间取得平衡，以及日常工作如何影响写作风格、主题和自律。

items.title_en: SETI@home: Data Acquisition and Front-End Processing (2025)
items.title_zh: SETI@home：数据获取与前端处理（2025）
items.summary_en: A 2025 assessment of SETI@home’s data acquisition and frontend processing pipelines, highlighting improvements in distributed volunteer computing, data validation, and real-time signal analysis. The work underscores citizen science’s ongoing role in large-scale data exploration.
items.summary_zh: 对 SETI@home 在2025年的数据获取与前端处理管线进行评估，聚焦分布式志愿计算、数据校验和实时信号分析的改进，显示公民科学在大规模数据探测中的持续价值。

items.title_en: Allegations of insider trading over prediction-market bets tied to Iran conflict
items.title_zh: 涉及伊朗冲突预测市场赌注的内幕交易指控
items.summary_en: Regulators allege insider trading tied to prediction-market bets around geopolitical events like the Iran conflict. The case highlights regulatory scrutiny as AI-assisted markets proliferate.
items.summary_zh: 监管机构指控涉及伊朗冲突等地缘事件的预测市场赌注存在内幕交易。这一案件凸显在 AI 驱动市场快速扩张背景下的监管关注。

items.title_en: Werner Herzog Between Fact and Fiction
items.title_zh: 沃纳·赫佐格：在事实与虚构之间
items.summary_en: Herzog's interviews and essays probe how truth travels between fact and fiction in documentary cinema and culture. The piece reflects on how his thinking informs media critique and future storytelling.
items.summary_zh: 赫尔佐格的访谈与文章探讨纪录片与文化中真相在事实与虚构之间的流动。他的观点为媒体批评与未来叙事提供了启示。

items.title_en: iPhone and iPad approved to handle classified NATO information
items.title_zh: iPhone 与 iPad 获准处理北约机密信息
items.summary_en: Apple has been approved to handle NATO classified information on iPhone and iPad, signaling government trust in secure hardware and iOS security features. The certification underscores the role of consumer devices in defense-related workflows and highlights ongoing security standards evolution.
items.summary_zh: 苹果获准在 iPhone 和 iPad 上处理北约机密信息，标志着政府对安全硬件与 iOS 安全特性的信任。该认证凸显了消费级设备在国防相关工作中的作用，并反映出安全标准的持续演进。

items.title_en: The Wolfram S Combinator Challenge
items.title_zh: 沃尔夫拉姆的 S 组合子挑战
items.summary_en: A primer on Wolfram's S combinator challenge, illustrating how combinatory logic underpins functional programming concepts. It invites readers to test their reasoning skills and explore the limits of symbolic computation.
items.summary_zh: 文章介绍沃尔夫拉姆的 S 组合子挑战，展示组合逻辑在函数式编程中的应用与思考，鼓励读者动手推理并探索符号计算的边界。

items.title_en: The challenges of porting Shufflepuck Cafe to the 8 bits Apple II
items.title_zh: 将 Shufflepuck Cafe 移植到 8 位 Apple II 的挑战
items.summary_en: Porting Shufflepuck Cafe to the Apple II’s 8-bit era exposes tight memory, CPU, and graphics constraints that force creative engineering. The piece details the trade-offs developers face when bringing modern gameplay to vintage hardware.
items.summary_zh: 将 Shufflepuck Cafe 移植到 8 位 Apple II 时代暴露出内存、CPU 与图形限制，迫使开发者进行创新性工程权衡。文章讲述将现代游戏移植到老硬件时的取舍。

items.title_en: Optophone
items.title_zh: Optophone（光声读屏器）
items.summary_en: Optophone was an early assistive technology that converts printed text into musical tones for blind readers, foreshadowing later tactile and speech-based interfaces. The device illustrates how inventors used sound to bridge gaps between vision and information.
items.summary_zh: Optophone 是一种早期辅助技术，通过将印刷文本转化为音调帮助盲人阅读，为后来的触觉与语音界面铺路，体现了用声音连接视觉信息的探索。

items.title_en: More Cows, More Wives
items.title_zh: 更多牛群、更多妻子
items.summary_en: A provocative look at how livestock wealth—cows—may influence marriage markets and social structures in different societies.
items.summary_zh: 本文以牲畜财富为切入点，探讨牛等资源如何影响婚娶市场与社会结构。

items.title_en: The Lighthouse: How extreme isolation transforms the body and mind (2020)
items.title_zh: 灯塔：极端孤立如何改变身体与大脑
items.summary_en: The Lighthouse article reviews how extreme isolation affects the body and mind, with implications for space missions, polar expeditions, and remote work. It highlights changes in sleep, stress responses, and cognitive function under prolonged confinement.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨极端孤立对身体和大脑的影响，涉及太空任务、极地探险及远程工作的启示。长期封闭环境下的睡眠、压力反应与认知功能变化被详细揭示。

items.title_en: Aromatic 5-silicon rings synthesized at last
items.title_zh: 芳香性五元硅环终于被合成
items.summary_en: The article reports the successful synthesis of an aromatic five-membered silicon ring, a milestone in inorganic chemistry. Such structures challenge conventional silicon chemistry, opening doors to novel materials and bonding concepts with potential implications for electronics and catalysis.
items.summary_zh: 报道了芳香性五元硅环的成功合成，这是无机化学领域的里程碑之作。这些结构挑战了传统的硅化学，可能为新材料、电子学和催化等领域带来新的结合与应用前景。

items.title_en: Text-Based Google Directions
items.title_zh: 基于文本的 Google 路线查询
items.summary_en: Text-Based Google Directions provides a simplified interface for parsing and displaying Google Maps routes via plain text, enabling quick lookups without the UI. It demonstrates how command-line or text-first tools can complement modern map services.
items.summary_zh: Text-Based Google Directions 提供了一个简化的文本界面，用于查询和呈现 Google 地图路线，省去图形界面。此类文本优先工具展示了命令行在现代地图服务中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Anthropic says it will challenge Pentagon supply chain risk designation in court
items.title_zh: Anthropic 表示将就 Pentagon 的供应链风险认定提起诉讼
items.summary_en: Anthropic says it will challenge the Pentagon's supply-chain risk designation in court, signaling the start of legal pushback against government risk classifications. The move could affect AI vendors' government access and trigger a broader policy conversation about security criteria.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 表示将就 Pentagon 的供应链风险认定提起诉讼，标志着对政府安全评估的法律抗辩的开始。此举可能影响 AI 供应商的政府接入并引发关于安全标准的更广泛讨论。

items.title_en: Build Your Own Forth Interpreter
items.title_zh: 动手构建你自己的 Forth 解释器
items.summary_en: A step-by-step guide shows how to build your own Forth interpreter from scratch, introducing stack-based language concepts and a minimal runtime. It’s a hands-on way to explore low-level language design.
items.summary_zh: 一个逐步挑战，带你从零开始构建自己的 Forth 解释器，学习基于堆栈的语言概念与最小运行时。通过实践，直观理解底层语言设计。

items.title_en: The archivist preserving decaying floppy disks
items.title_zh: 守护逐渐腐化的软盘的档案管理员
items.summary_en: A look at the archival effort to salvage data from aging floppy disks reveals the fragility of early digital media and the ingenuity required to preserve it. Archivists pair hardware quirks with emulation and meticulous metadata to recover manuscripts, photos, and software from decades past.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦拯救逐渐腐朽的软盘数据的档案工作，揭示早期数字媒体的脆弱性以及保护它所需的巧思。档案人员将硬件差异与仿真技术、细致的元数据结合，恢复数十年前的文稿、照片与软件。

items.title_en: Show HN: Badge that shows how well your codebase fits in an LLM's context window
items.title_zh: Show HN：显示代码库在大语言模型上下文窗口中的适配度的徽章
items.summary_en: Show HN: A badge that visualizes how much of your codebase fits into an LLM's context window. It helps teams estimate prompt sizing and chunking strategies for real-world projects.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：一个徽章能直观显示代码库在大语言模型上下文窗口中能容纳的比例，帮助团队评估提示长度和代码分块策略。

items.title_en: Show HN: Linex – A daily challenge: placing pieces on a board that fights back
items.title_zh: Linex——每日挑战：在会反扑的棋盘上放置棋子
items.summary_en: Linex challenges players with a daily puzzle where your moves are countered by a reactive board, creating a tight cognitive loop. The premise combines strategy and incremental difficulty, appealing to fans of logic puzzles and algorithmic gameplay.
items.summary_zh: Linex 为玩家带来每日谜题，棋子落下后棋盘会进行反击，形成紧密的认知循环。题材将策略与递进难度结合，吸引逻辑谜题与算法玩法的爱好者。

items.title_en: The Robotic Dexterity Deadlock
items.title_zh: 机器人灵巧性的僵局
items.summary_en: Robotic Dexterity Deadlock argues that improving manipulation hinges on solving perception, planning, and actuation bottlenecks, not just advanced hardware. The piece maps why achieving human-like dexterity remains elusive and outlines potential paths forward for researchers and engineers.
items.summary_zh: 《机器人灵巧性的僵局》指出，提升操作灵活性不仅要依赖先进的硬件，更要解决感知、规划与执行等瓶颈。文章梳理了为何实现类似人类的灵巧度仍然困难，并为研究者和工程师指明了可能的突破方向。

items.title_en: The Musidex: A physical music library for the streaming era
items.title_zh: Musidex：面向流媒体时代的实体音乐库
items.summary_en: The Musidex presents a physical library concept designed for the streaming era, combining metal shelves and metadata-driven organization to help users manage large music collections alongside streaming access.
items.summary_zh: Musidex 提出一个面向流媒体时代的实体音乐库概念，围绕硬件载体与元数据组织来管理大规模音乐收藏并支持流媒体访问。

items.title_en: How to train your program verifier
items.title_zh: 如何训练你的程序验证器
items.summary_en: The post surveys practical approaches to training program verifiers, highlighting how to combine spec-driven data with automated proof search to improve reliability. It covers datasets, tooling, and evaluation strategies to make verifiers more reliable in real-world code.
items.summary_zh: 文章概述训练程序验证器的实用方法，强调通过将规范数据与自动化证明技术结合来提升验证能力。内容涵盖数据生成、工具链与在真实代码中的评估策略。

items.title_en: America, and probably the world, stands on a precipice
items.title_zh: 美国及全球正站在悬崖边缘
items.summary_en: A provocative take arguing that the US and perhaps the world are facing critical risks in politics, technology policy, and global dynamics. It urges urgent reassessment of governance, resilience, and the role of tech in society.
items.summary_zh: 这篇引发争议的文章认为美国乃至全球正面临政治、科技政策与全球格局等方面的关键风险。呼吁对治理、韧性建设以及以科技驱动增长的路径进行紧急反思。

items.title_en: We are changing our developer productivity experiment design
items.title_zh: 我们正在改变开发者生产力实验设计
items.summary_en: An update on refining how they measure developer productivity, including changes to experiment design and evaluation to better reflect real-world impact.
items.summary_zh: 介绍他们在改进开发者生产力实验设计与评估方法，以更准确地反映实际工作中的影响。

items.title_en: Fentanyl makeover: Core structural redesign could lead to safer pain medications
items.title_zh: 芬太尼改造：核心结构重新设计或带来更安全的止痛药
items.summary_en: Researchers redesigned the core scaffold of fentanyl-inspired analgesics with the aim of reducing abuse potential while preserving pain relief. If validated, this approach could guide safer opioid design, though it will need careful safety and regulatory scrutiny.
items.summary_zh: 研究者在芬太尼样止痛药的核心骨架上进行 redesign，目标是降低滥用风险同时保留镇痛效果。若得到验证，这一思路或为更安全的阿片类药物设计提供方向，但需要审慎的安全性与监管评估。

items.title_en: The Life Cycle of Money
items.title_zh: 金钱的生命周期
items.summary_en: The Life Cycle of Money traces money’s journey through creation, circulation, and settlement, highlighting how debt, central banks, and digital payments shape the modern economy.
items.summary_zh: 追溯货币的产生、流通与清算全过程，揭示债务、央行与数字支付如何塑造现代经济。

items.title_en: Ghosts'n Goblins – “Worse danger is ahead”
items.title_zh: Ghosts'n Goblins：’更大的危险在前方’
items.summary_en: Ghosts'n Goblins uses a retro-game framing to warn that greater dangers lie ahead in tech or policy. It argues for cautious risk assessment, robust defenses, and proactive mitigation.
items.summary_zh: 以复古游戏为隐喻，提醒技术或政策领域更大风险即将到来。强调审慎风险评估、健全防御与前瞻性缓解策略。

items.title_en: Dyson settles forced labour suit in landmark UK case
items.title_zh: 戴森在英国案件中就强迫劳工和解，创下里程碑
items.summary_en: A landmark UK settlement in a forced labor case against Dyson, signaling greater scrutiny of supply chains and corporate accountability for labor practices.
items.summary_zh: 戴森因强迫劳工案件在英国达成具有里程碑意义的和解，体现对供应链和企业劳工合规的新一轮审查与问责。

items.title_en: Building secure, scalable agent sandbox infrastructure
items.title_zh: 构建安全、可扩展的代理沙箱基础设施
items.summary_en: Two architectures for secure, scalable agent sandboxes are explored, comparing lightweight container-like approaches with fully isolated VM or unikernel strategies.
items.summary_zh: 文中比较了两种对代理进行沙箱化的安全、可扩展架构：轻量级容器类方案与完全隔离的虚拟机等策略。讨论了安全性、性能、部署复杂度与治理之间的权衡，为开发者在选择路径时提供指引。

items.title_en: Debian Removes Free Pascal Compiler / Lazarus IDE
items.title_zh: Debian 移除 Free Pascal 编译器与 Lazarus IDE
items.summary_en: Debian has removed Free Pascal Compiler and Lazarus IDE from its repositories, citing maintenance and licensing concerns. The move impacts Pascal developers and the Lazarus community, who may need to seek alternatives or contribute back.
items.summary_zh: Debian 已将 Free Pascal 编译器与 Lazarus IDE 从仓库中移除，原因是维护与许可方面的考虑。这一举动影响到使用 Pascal 的开发者与 Lazarus 社区，可能需要寻找替代方案或贡献回馈。

items.title_en: The Tears of Donald Knuth (2015)
items.title_zh: 唐纳德·克努斯之泪（2015）
items.summary_en: The Tears of Donald Knuth is an opinion piece reflecting on the emotional dimensions of long-running contributions to CS and typography, using Knuth as a touchstone.
items.summary_zh: 这篇观点文章以 Knuth 的情感表达为线索，讨论科技领域长期贡献者在面对挑战时的情感与坚持。

items.title_en: Extending C with Prolog (1994)
items.title_zh: 用 Prolog 扩展 C（1994）
items.summary_en: A 1994 piece shows merging C with Prolog to build expert systems, blending imperative performance with logic programming. It reflects early attempts at multi-paradigm design in systems programming and foreshadows later approaches.
items.summary_zh: 1994 年的介绍展示了用 Prolog 来扩展 C，结合命令式的执行效率与逻辑编程的推理能力来构建专家系统。这体现了早期的多范式编程思路，并预示了后来的混合语言与系统架构趋势。

items.title_en: Cl-kawa: Scheme on Java on Common Lisp
items.title_zh: cl-kawa：用 Common Lisp 在 Java 平台上实现 Scheme
items.summary_en: Cl-kawa implements Scheme on the JVM using Common Lisp, enabling Scheme code to run alongside Java with interop to Java libraries. The project highlights the challenges of hosting a Lisp dialect on the Java platform and offers a path for language experimentation on the JVM.
items.summary_zh: cl-kawa 让 Scheme 能在 JVM 上运行，借助 Common Lisp 的实现实现与 Java 的互操作。该工作揭示在 JVM 上混合 Lisp 方言的挑战与可能性，为语言实验和跨语言开发提供了有趣的路径。

items.title_en: Setting up OpenClaw on a cloud VM
items.title_zh: 在云虚拟机上设置 OpenClaw
items.summary_en: Setting up OpenClaw on a cloud VM walks through deploying the OpenClaw framework in a cloud environment, covering prerequisites, configuration, and running tests. The guide helps researchers prototype AI-agent workflows without managing local infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 在云虚拟机上设置 OpenClaw 的指南，介绍在云环境中部署 OpenClaw 框架、前置条件、配置和测试步骤。该指南帮助研究者原型化 AI-代理工作流，而无需管理本地基础设施。

items.title_en: 1Password Raising Prices ~33%
items.title_zh: 1Password 价格上涨约 33%
items.summary_en: 1Password announces a March price increase of up to 33%, affecting both personal and business plans. Customers may reevaluate value, compare alternatives, and consider pricing sensitivity in a crowded password-management space.
items.summary_zh: 1Password 将于三月涨价，涨幅最高约 33%，影响个人与企业订阅。用户需要评估价值、对比替代方案，并关注在密码管理市场中的价格敏感度。

items.title_en: Sovereignty in a System Prompt
items.title_zh: 系统提示中的主权
items.summary_en: Sovereignty in a System Prompt examines how system prompts influence agent behavior and control, debating who owns the model's behavior and how to embed governance within prompts.
items.summary_zh: 系统提示中的主权探讨系统提示如何影响模型行为与控制，讨论谁拥有模型行为以及如何在提示中嵌入治理策略。

items.title_en: What I learned designing a barebones UI engine
items.title_zh: 设计极简 UI 引擎的经验教训
items.summary_en: Designing a barebones UI engine teaches trade-offs between simplicity and feature richness, including rendering, input handling, accessibility, and platform quirks.
items.summary_zh: 记录在设计极简UI引擎过程中的取舍，涵盖渲染、输入处理、无障碍性以及跨平台差异等要点。

items.title_en: Rydberg atoms detect clear signals from a handheld radio
items.title_zh: Rydberg 原子从手持无线电中探测到清晰信号
items.summary_en: Researchers show Rydberg atoms can detect clear signals from a handheld radio, enabling compact, sensitive radio sensing. This opens possibilities for lightweight receivers and new quantum-enabled sensing applications.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员证明 Rydberg 原子能够从手持无线电中检测到清晰信号，带来紧凑高灵敏的射频传感能力。此技术有望推动轻量接收设备与量子感测应用的发展。

items.title_en: Steering interpretable language models with concept algebra
items.title_zh: Steering interpretable language models with concept algebra
items.summary_en: Steerling/ concept algebra offers a framework to steer language models toward interpretable behaviors, exploring algebraic constructs to guide outputs. The approach could improve controllability and transparency in AI systems and mitigate unsafe or unexpected responses.
items.summary_zh: 用概念代数引导可解释语言模型，提供一种让模型朝向可理解行为的框架，探索代数结构来控制输出。这一方法有望提升AI系统的可控性与透明度，并降低不安全或意外输出的风险。

items.title_en: PL/0
items.title_zh: PL/0：用于教学的极简编程语言
items.summary_en: PL/0 is a minimal teaching programming language designed for compiler construction education, with a small, clean syntax and a simple semantics. It serves as an approachable platform for learning parsing, code generation, and language design concepts.
items.summary_zh: PL/0 是一种用于编译原理教学的极简编程语言，具备简洁的语法和清晰的语义。它为学习解析、代码生成与语言设计提供了一个易上手的平台。

items.title_en: How to Allocate Memory
items.title_zh: 如何分配内存
items.summary_en: A compact guide to memory allocation strategies, covering stack vs heap, allocation patterns, and common fragmentation pitfalls for performance-critical code.
items.summary_zh: 简要指南介绍内存分配策略，涵盖栈与堆、分配模式以及常见碎片化问题，帮助提升高性能代码的效率。

items.title_en: Building a Minimal Transformer for 10-digit Addition
items.title_zh: 构建用于十位数相加的最小 Transformer
items.summary_en: Shows how a minimal transformer can learn 10-digit addition, shedding light on how far tiny neural nets can go on structured arithmetic tasks.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个极简的 Transformer 如何学习十位数相加，揭示在结构化算术任务上小型神经网络的潜力与局限。

items.title_en: Access to a Shared Unix Computer
items.title_zh: 共享 Unix 计算机的访问
items.summary_en: A public Unix computer project invites anyone to access a shared machine, fostering learning and collaborative exploration of Unix systems. It’s a nostalgic, low-friction way to tinker, contribute, and learn by doing.
items.summary_zh: 一个公开的 Unix 计算机项目向所有人开放访问，推动学习与协作性探索 Unix 系统。它提供一种低门槛、带有怀旧感的动手实践方式，让人们通过贡献与试错来学习。

items.title_en: Pinterest is drowning in a sea of AI slop and auto-moderation
items.title_zh: Pinterest 面临 AI 内容泛滥与自动审核挑战
items.summary_en: Pinterest struggles with a flood of AI-generated content and the burden of auto-moderation, raising questions about content quality, moderation tools, and user experience.
items.summary_zh: Pinterest 正在应对 AI 生成内容泛滥和自动审核带来的质控与工作量问题，影响平台内容质量与用户体验。

items.title_en: Computer-generated dream world: Virtual reality for a 286 processor
items.title_zh: 286 处理器上的计算机生成梦境世界：虚拟现实
items.summary_en: A playful exploration of virtual reality running on an 80286-class processor demonstrates how constrained hardware can still deliver immersive experiences. It's a reminder that the bottlenecks of old tech can inspire new approaches to efficiency and performance.
items.summary_zh: 在 80286 级别的处理器上实现虚拟现实，展示了受限硬件仍能提供沉浸式体验的可能性。通过一系列渲染与输入的巧妙技巧，作品把复古硬件推向极限。它提醒人们，旧技术的瓶颈也能激发更高效的设计思路。

items.title_en: Code has always been the easy part
items.title_zh: 编码一直是最简单的部分
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the real challenges lie beyond writing code—requirements, collaboration, and system design shape outcomes more than syntax. It urges engineers to invest in processes, communication, and product sense to deliver durable software.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张真正的挑战不在编写代码本身，而在需求、协作和系统设计等因素。呼吁工程师投入于流程、沟通和产品意识，以交付更稳健的软件。

items.title_en: A 26-Gram Butterfly-Inspired Robot Achieving Autonomous Tailless Flight
items.title_zh: 26克蝴蝶式机器人实现自主无尾飞行
items.summary_en: A 26-gram butterfly-inspired robot demonstrates autonomous tailless flight, using lightweight actuation and flexible wings, a step forward for micro aerial robotics.
items.summary_zh: 26 克蝴蝶灵感的机器人实现了自主无尾飞行，依靠轻量化驱动与柔性翼面，标志着微型无人机领域的一步重要进展。

items.title_en: PCB Tracer
items.title_zh: PCB Tracer
items.summary_en: PCB Tracer offers a browser-based tool to trace nets and inspect PCB designs, making it easier for hobbyists and professionals to understand complex schematics and verify layouts. The project lowers the barrier to debugging and iteration in PCB work.
items.summary_zh: PCB Tracer 提供基于浏览器的电路板网线追踪与设计检查工具，方便爱好者和专业人士理解复杂原理图并核对布局。该工具降低了PCB调试与迭代的门槛。

items.title_en: Large study finds link between cannabis use in teens and psychosis later
items.title_zh: 大型研究发现青少年大麻使用与后期精神病风险相关
items.summary_en: A longitudinal study links teen cannabis use with higher risk of psychosis later, with effects depending on frequency and age of use. The findings contribute to debates on policy and adolescent health.
items.summary_zh: 纵向研究发现青少年大麻使用与 later 概念的精神病风险增加相关，频率和使用年龄影响强度。这一结果为政策和青少年健康辩论提供了证据。

items.title_en: Hydroph0bia – fixed SecureBoot bypass for UEFI firmware from Insyde H2O (2025)
items.title_zh: Hydroph0bia：对 Insyde H2O UEFI 固件的 SecureBoot 绕过漏洞修复（2025）
items.summary_en: Details a fixed SecureBoot bypass in Insyde H2O UEFI firmware, illustrating ongoing firmware security challenges and how vendors patch critical boot-time vulnerabilities.
items.summary_zh: 介绍对 Insyde H2O UEFI 固件 SecureBoot 绕过漏洞的修复，揭示固件安全领域的持续挑战以及厂商对关键引导阶段漏洞的修补实践。

items.title_en: Emuko: Fast RISC-V emulator written in Rust, boots Linux
items.title_zh: Emuko：用 Rust 编写的快速 RISC-V 模拟器，能够启动 Linux
items.summary_en: Emuko is a high-performance RISC-V emulator written in Rust that can boot a Linux kernel, a notable achievement for systems emulation in safe languages. It provides a practical platform for experimenting with OS internals and virtualization ideas without the overhead of full hardware. The project showcases Rust’s viability for low-level tooling.
items.summary_zh: Emuko 是用 Rust 编写的高性能 RISC-V 模拟器，能够引导 Linux 内核，是在安全语言中实现系统仿真的重要成就。它为研究操作系统内部结构和虚拟化思路提供了一个实际平台，避免了直接硬件的开销。该项目展示了 Rust 作为底层工具的可行性。

items.title_en: Working on Pharo Smalltalk: BPatterns: Rewrite Engine with Smalltalk Style
items.title_zh: 在 Pharo Smalltalk 上的 BPatterns：使用 Smalltalk 风格的重写引擎
items.summary_en: A look at BPatterns, a rewrite engine built in the Pharo Smalltalk ecosystem, showcasing pattern-based rewrites and idiomatic Smalltalk design. The post demonstrates how language-integrated tooling can simplify complex transformations.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在 Pharo Smalltalk 生态系统中实现的 BPatterns 重写引擎，展示基于模式的重写和地道的 Smalltalk 设计。该文展示了语言集成工具如何简化复杂转换。

items.title_en: Aqua: A CLI message tool for AI agents
items.title_zh: Aqua：用于 AI 代理的命令行消息工具
items.summary_en: Aqua provides a CLI to interact with AI agents, enabling scripted prompts, messaging, and orchestration of agent workflows. It aims to streamline multi-agent experimentation and automation for developers.
items.summary_zh: Aqua 提供一个命令行界面，用于与 AI 代理进行交互、发送消息并编排代理工作流。设计目标是加速多代理实验与自动化。

items.title_en: PostmarketOS in 2026-02: generic kernels, bans use of generative AI
items.title_zh: PostmarketOS 2026-02 更新：通用内核与禁止使用生成式 AI
items.summary_en: PostmarketOS announces a February 2026 update focused on generic kernels to widen device support, along with a policy banning generative AI usage due to safety/licensing concerns.
items.summary_zh: PostmarketOS 发布 2026 年 2 月更新，聚焦通用内核以扩大设备支持，同时禁止使用生成式 AI，出于安全与许可方面的考量。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a zero-browser, pure-JS typesetting engine for bit-perfect PDFs
items.title_zh: Show HN：零浏览器、纯 JavaScript 的位精确排版引擎
items.summary_en: A pure-JS, zero-dependency typesetting engine that outputs bit-perfect PDFs without relying on a browser's layout engine. It demonstrates how much you can push in the JS sandbox and opens up offline, deterministic printing workflows. This could inform reproducible publishing pipelines and minimal runtime footprints.
items.summary_zh: 一个纯 JavaScript、零依赖的排版引擎，输出位精确的 PDF，不依赖浏览器排版引擎。展示了在纯 JS 沙箱内还能实现的极致排版能力，并为离线、确定性打印工作流打开了可能性。这样的实现可能推动可重复出版流程和最小化运行时开销的探索。

items.title_en: Deterministic Programming with LLMs
items.title_zh: LLMs 的确定性编程
items.summary_en: Argues for making LLM-driven programs deterministic through controlled prompting, tool usage, and state management. This improves reproducibility, testability, and safety when deploying AI-powered software.
items.summary_zh: 提出通过受控提示、工具调用和状态管理等手段，让基于 LLM 的程序实现确定性。提升了在部署 AI 驱动软件时的可重复性、可测试性和安全性。

items.title_en: Pipelined Relational Query Language, Pronounced "Prequel"
items.title_zh: 管线化关系查询语言，发音为“Prequel”
items.summary_en: PRQL offers a pipeline-style query language that compiles to SQL, aiming to improve readability and composability of data queries. By enabling incremental abstractions and integration with existing databases, it could reshape analytics workflows.
items.summary_zh: PRQL 提供一种管线化查询语言，可编译为 SQL，提升查询的可读性与组合性，并便于与现有数据库对接，可能改变数据分析管线的构建方式。

items.title_en: Next-gen spacecraft are overwhelming communication networks
items.title_zh: 新一代航天器正压垮通信网络
items.summary_en: As spacecraft become data-intensive, current communication networks struggle with bandwidth, latency, and reliability. The piece argues for redesigned space communication architectures and edge processing to meet mission demands.
items.summary_zh: 随着航天器数据密集化，现有通信网络在带宽、时延和可靠性方面面临挑战。文章主张对航天通信体系进行重新设计，并强化边缘处理以满足任务需求。

items.title_en: ATAboy is a USB adapter for legacy CHS only style IDE (PATA) drives
items.title_zh: ATAboy：面向旧式 CHS 风格 IDE（PATA）硬盘的 USB 适配器
items.summary_en: ATAboy is a USB adapter that lets you connect legacy CHS/PATA hard drives to modern machines. It’s a niche tool for data recovery and retro hardware projects, with implications for hardware restoration workflows.
items.summary_zh: ATAboy 是一款 USB 适配器，能将传统 CHS/PATA 硬盘连接到现代设备，适合数据恢复与复古硬件项目，相关使用场景包括老旧设备的重建工作。

items.title_en: IBM Plunges After Anthropic's Latest Update Takes on COBOL
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的最新更新挑战 COBOL，IBM 股价走低
items.summary_en: Anthropic’s latest update targeting COBOL compatibility spooks investors, causing IBM shares to slip as enterprise software longevity and AI capabilities intersect in unexpected ways.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 的最新更新在 COBOL 兼容性方面发力，令投资者感到担忧，导致 IBM 股价回落，凸显企业软件传统与 AI 能力的错综关系。
