items.title_en: Anthropic Education the AI Fluency Index
items.title_zh: Anthropic 发布 AI 流畅度指数教育版
items.summary_en: Anthropic's AI Fluency Index measures how well people can understand and interact with AI systems. The index has implications for education, policy, and workforce readiness as AI tools become more embedded in work and life. It signals a push to quantify AI literacy beyond basic exposure.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 的 AI 流畅度指数衡量人们理解和使用 AI 系统的能力。该指数关系到教育、政策和职场适应性，随着 AI 工具融入日常工作与生活，它强调不仅是接触，还需具备深入的 AI 素养。

items.title_en: How close are we to a vision for 2010?
items.title_zh: 离2010年的愿景还差多远？
items.summary_en: A reflection on how close we are to the 2010 tech vision, evaluating predictions about AI, mobile, the web, and hardware, and what actually materialized.
items.summary_zh: 回顾到2010年的科技愿景，评估AI、移动、网络与硬件领域的预测落地情况，揭示哪些已成真、哪些未实现。

items.title_en: Chorba: A novel CRC32 implementation (2024)
items.title_zh: Chorba：一种新颖的 CRC32 实现（2024）
items.summary_en: Chorba introduces a novel CRC32 implementation that aims to boost throughput and reduce memory usage. The approach may employ table-free algorithms or processor-specific optimizations to speed up checksums on large data streams. Efficient CRC implementations matter for data integrity in storage, networking, and embedded systems.
items.summary_zh: Chorba 提出了一种新颖的 CRC32 实现，目标是提升吞吐量并降低内存占用。该方法可能采用无表算法或专用处理器优化，以在大数据流中加速校验和计算。高效的 CRC 实现对存储、网络和嵌入式系统的数据完整性至关重要。

items.title_en: The complete Manic Miner disassembly
items.title_zh: Manic Miner 的完整反汇编
items.summary_en: A complete disassembly of Manic Miner reveals how the ZX Spectrum game was engineered within tight memory and hardware constraints, offering lessons for retro developers.
items.summary_zh: 对 Manic Miner 的完整反汇编揭示了 ZX Spectrum 时代在有限内存和硬件约束下的工程实现，为复古开发者提供经验教训。

items.title_en: Compact disc story (1998)
items.title_zh: 光盘故事（1998）
items.summary_en: A retrospective on the compact disc era, tracing rollout, industry dynamics, and the shift from physical media to digital distribution.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 1998 年代的光盘时代，梳理推出过程、行业动态，以及从实体介质向数字分发的转变。

items.title_en: Show HN: Audio Toolkit for Agents
items.title_zh: Show HN：面向代理的音频工具包
items.summary_en: Show HN presents an audio toolkit for agents—modular components for audio input/output, speech processing, and streaming pipelines. It demonstrates how agents can reason over real-time audio data and integrate with external services to enhance interactive workflows.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一个面向代理的音频工具包，提供音频输入/输出、语音处理和流式处理等模块化组件。展示了代理如何基于实时音频数据进行推理并接入外部服务，提升交互工作流的能力。

items.title_en: Running a One Trillion-Parameter LLM Locally on AMD Ryzen AI Max+ Cluster
items.title_zh: 在 AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 集群上本地运行一万亿参数的 LLM
items.summary_en: AMD demonstrates locally running a trillion-parameter LLM on a Ryzen AI Max+ cluster, likely using model parallelism and quantization to fit hardware constraints. This signals growing feasibility of private, on-prem AI at scale.
items.summary_zh: AMD 展示在 Ryzen AI Max+ 集群上本地运行万亿参数的 LLM，凭借模型并行和量化等技术实现硬件约束下的可行性。这表明在私有、本地大规模 AI 部署方面的可行性正在提升。

items.title_en: Topological Naming Problem
items.title_zh: 拓扑命名问题
items.summary_en: Topological naming problem explains why FreeCAD's modeled objects sometimes get unstable or non-deterministic identifiers due to topology changes, complicating references and data interchange. The issue motivates design approaches to stabilize names and serialization.
items.summary_zh: 拓扑命名问题解释了 FreeCAD 的建模对象在拓扑发生变化时可能获得不稳定或非确定的标识符，影响引用与数据交换。此问题推动在命名与序列化方面的稳健性设计改进。

items.title_en: Programming in K
items.title_zh: K 语言编程
items.summary_en: A primer on programming in K, covering its terse syntax, array-centric operations, and distinctive idioms. It contrasts K's expressiveness with mainstream languages and shows how to implement common tasks succinctly.
items.summary_zh: 本教程介绍 K 语言的编程要点，涵盖其简洁语法、面向数组的操作以及独特的编程习惯。对比主流语言，展示以更紧凑的方式实现常见任务的方式。

items.title_en: You Just Need Postgres
items.title_zh: 其实你只需要 Postgres
items.summary_en: Argues that PostgreSQL is capable of handling a wide range of workloads with the right extensions and data modeling, making it a versatile default choice for many stacks.
items.summary_zh: 认为 PostgreSQL 通过合适的扩展与数据模型即可胜任多种工作负载，是众多技术栈的通用、稳定选择。

items.title_en: Launch HN: TeamOut (YC W22) – AI agent for planning company retreats
items.title_zh: Launch HN: TeamOut（YC W22）——用于规划公司活动的 AI 代理
items.summary_en: TeamOut offers an AI agent to assist planning company events, from scheduling to vendor coordination. It showcases how AI copilots can streamline internal event logistics and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: TeamOut 提供一个 AI 代理来协助规划公司活动，从日程安排到供应商对接，帮助团队更高效地完成内部活动的筹备工作。

items.title_en: Show HN: Xmloxide – an agent made rust replacement for libxml2
items.title_zh: Xmloxide：用 Rust 重写的 libxml2 替代方案
items.summary_en: Xmloxide is a Rust-based XML parser intended to replace libxml2 with safer memory handling and improved performance. It exemplifies a broader migration from C libraries to Rust to improve security and reliability in core tooling.
items.summary_zh: Xmloxide 是一个用 Rust 实现的 XML 解析器，旨在更安全地取代 libxml2 并提升性能。它体现了将关键 C 库迁移到 Rust 以提高安全性与可靠性的趋势。

items.title_en: Confusables.txt and NFKC disagree on 31 characters
items.title_zh: Confusables.txt 与 NFKC 在31个字符上的不一致
items.summary_en: Unicode studies show Confusables.txt mappings clash with NFKC normalization for 31 characters, producing potential security and UX pitfalls in input handling and font rendering.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示 Confusables.txt 的映射与 NFKC 正规化在 31 个字符上存在冲突，可能带来输入处理与字体渲染的安全与用户体验问题。文章给出具体示例，并倡议在依赖 Unicode 清理的应用中谨慎选择正规化策略。

items.title_en: Intel XeSS 3: expanded support for Core Ultra/Core Ultra 2 and Arc A, B series
items.title_zh: Intel XeSS 3：对 Core Ultra/Ultra 2 及 Arc A、B 系列的扩展支持
items.summary_en: Intel XeSS 3 expands support across Core Ultra/Ultra 2 and Arc A/B series GPUs, potentially widening adoption and smoothing performance across newer and older hardware. It signals ongoing investment in scalable upscaling tech.
items.summary_zh: XeSS 3 将对 Core Ultra/Ultra 2 以及 Arc A、B 系列显卡扩展支持，或提升新旧显卡上的性能与兼容性，体现对可扩展升频技术的持续投入。

items.title_en: Genetic underpinnings of chills from art and music
items.title_zh: 艺术与音乐引起寒颤的遗传机制
items.summary_en: A study maps genetic factors that influence how art and music induce chills, linking neuroscience with aesthetics. The findings help explain why certain sensory experiences evoke strong emotional responses.
items.summary_zh: 研究揭示艺术和音乐引发颤抖的遗传因素，连接神经科学与审美体验。结果帮助解释为何某些感官体验能触发强烈情感反应。

items.title_en: Latency numbers every programmer should know
items.title_zh: 每个程序员都应该知道的延迟数值
items.summary_en: Latency numbers every programmer should know compile practical figures—from CPU cycles to network RTT—that frame performance budgets and guide architectural decisions.
items.summary_zh: 汇总从 CPU 时钟周期到网络往返时间的关键延迟数值，为性能预算定界并指导架构决策。

items.title_en: Emulating Goto in Scheme with Continuations
items.title_zh: 在 Scheme 中用 Continuations 模拟 goto
items.summary_en: An exploration of using continuations to implement goto-like control flow in Scheme. It demonstrates the expressive power of non-linear execution and informs discussions on language design and compilers.
items.summary_zh: 通过 Continuations 在 Scheme 中实现类似 goto 的控制流，展示了非线性执行的表达力，并对语言设计与编译器实现的讨论提供洞见。

items.title_en: What Is a Centipawn Advantage?
items.title_zh: 何为百步棋分（centipawn）优势？
items.summary_en: Centipawn advantage is a unit used by chess engines to quantify how far the position is from equality. The article explains interpretation, how it translates to practical gains, and its limits when the position is highly complex.
items.summary_zh: 百步棋分是象棋引擎用来量化局面领先程度的单位，能帮助理解评估值。文章解释了该单位的解读、对实际优势的转化，以及在复杂局面中的局限性。

items.title_en: RK3588 and RK3576 video decoders support merged in the upstream Linux Kernel
items.title_zh: RK3588 与 RK3576 视频解码器在上游 Linux 内核中合并支持
items.summary_en: Upstream Linux kernel now merges support for RK3588 and RK3576 video decoders, simplifying driver maintenance and enabling hardware-accelerated video on affected devices. The merge reduces downstream patching and simplifies upstream/downstream collaboration for RK-based platforms.
items.summary_zh: 上游 Linux 内核现已合并对 RK3588 与 RK3576 视频解码器的支持，简化驱动维护并提升受影响设备的硬件解码能力。此次合并有助于减少下游补丁和简化基于 RK 的平台在上下游协作中的工作。

items.title_en: Distributed Systems for Fun and Profit
items.title_zh: 分布式系统：乐趣与利润
items.summary_en: A compact, readable overview of distributed systems design, exploring consistency, fault tolerance, and scalability through practical patterns. The piece blends intuition with engineering pragmatism, making it useful for practitioners building resilient services.
items.summary_zh: 一本简明易懂的分布式系统设计综述，探讨一致性、容错与可扩展性等主题，通过实用模式进行讲解。文中将直觉与工程实用性结合，适合构建高可靠服务的从业者阅读。

items.title_en: Sandboxes won't save you from OpenClaw
items.title_zh: 沙箱不能保护你免受 OpenClaw 攻击
items.summary_en: The piece argues that sandboxing alone is insufficient to defend against OpenClaw-style compromises, which can exfiltrate data or break out of containers. It advocates defense-in-depth with hardware isolation, runtime monitoring, and stronger supply-chain controls.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为单纯的沙箱不足以防御 OpenClaw 之类的漏洞利用，攻击者可能突破容器边界并窃取数据。建议采用多层防御，包括硬件隔离、运行时监控和更强的供应链控制。

items.title_en: The Pleasures and Pains of Coffee (1830)
items.title_zh: 1830 年代的咖啡：乐趣与痛苦
items.summary_en: A historical look at coffee culture in the 1830s, examining how brewing, social rituals, and commerce shaped daily life. The piece connects 19th-century coffee habits to enduring modern coffee culture.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 1830 年代的咖啡文化，探讨冲泡方法、社交仪式与商业经济如何塑造日常生活。此历史反映为现代咖啡文化的雏形。

items.title_en: Dear Time Lords: Freeze Computers in 1993
items.title_zh: 致时间领主：1993 年冻结计算机
items.summary_en: A nostalgic piece examining how 1993-era computing constraints shaped software workflows, hardware experimentation, and tech culture, framed with a playful time-travel motif. It also reflects on lessons modern developers can draw from those constraints.
items.summary_zh: 一篇怀旧文，回顾1993年计算机时代的约束如何影响软件工作流、硬件试验与科技文化，以趣味的时光穿梭隐喻呈现。它也反思了现代开发者可以从这些约束中获得的经验教训。

items.title_en: Show HN: SplatHash – A lightweight alternative to BlurHash and ThumbHash
items.title_zh: Show HN：SplatHash——比 BlurHash/ThumbHash 更轻量的占位哈希
items.summary_en: SplatHash provides a compact, fast way to generate placeholder representations for images with minimal computation. It aims to be simpler and smaller than BlurHash or ThumbHash, making it easier to implement in low-resource apps. This leads to snappier placeholders on mobile and web.
items.summary_zh: SplatHash 提供一种紧凑、快速的方式来生成图片的占位表示，计算成本极低。它力求比 BlurHash 或 ThumbHash 更简单、占用更小，便于在资源受限的应用中实现。这样可以使移动端和网页上的占位图更流畅。

items.title_en: The most-seen UI on the internet? Redesigning turnstile and challenge pages
items.title_zh: 互联网最常见的 UI？重新设计 Turnstile 与挑战页面
items.summary_en: Cloudflare's Turnstile and its challenge pages are among the most visible web UIs. This redesign aims to improve accessibility, performance, and user experience while maintaining security goals, potentially shaping future CAPTCHA-style interfaces.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 的 Turnstile 及其挑战页是网页上最常见的 UI 之一。此次重设计旨在提升无障碍、性能与用户体验，同时保持安全性，可能为未来的 CAPTCHA 风格界面设定新模板。

items.title_en: Americans Are Leaving the U.S. in Record Numbers
items.title_zh: 美国人以创纪录速度离开美国
items.summary_en: U.S. migration data show record numbers of Americans moving abroad or to other states. The trend could reshape talent flows, demographics, and regional economic policy.
items.summary_zh: 移民数据表明，美国有大量居民在向海外或其他州迁移，这与生活成本、就业市场和政治环境等因素相关。此趋势可能影响国内政策、人才留存及经济地理格局。

items.title_en: I think WebRTC is better than SSH-ing for connecting to Mac terminal from iPhone
items.title_zh: 我认为 WebRTC 比 SSH 连接 iPhone 上的 Mac 终端更好
items.summary_en: Argues that WebRTC could be a better method than SSH for connecting to a Mac terminal from an iPhone, highlighting latency, UX, and security trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: 提出 WebRTC 作为从 iPhone 连接到 Mac 终端的替代方案，优于 SSH，重点比较延迟、用户体验和安全性等权衡。

items.title_en: Facebook's Fascination with My Robots.txt
items.title_zh: Facebook 对 robots.txt 的迷恋
items.summary_en: A look at how Facebook enforces crawling rules via robots.txt and related controls, revealing tensions between platform governance and data access. The approach has implications for researchers, competitors, and developers seeking data from social networks.
items.summary_zh: 本文揭示 Facebook 如何通过 robots.txt 及相关抓取规则管理数据访问，体现平台治理与数据开放之间的张力。此举可能影响研究者、竞争对手及开发者在社交网络上的数据获取策略。

items.title_en: Pigeons and Planes Has a Website Again
items.title_zh: Pigeons and Planes 重新上线网站
items.summary_en: The long-running music site Pigeons & Planes has relaunched its website with updated design and content strategy. The move illustrates how indie media properties evolve, monetize, and resume publication after platform shifts.
items.summary_zh: 长期运营的音乐媒体 Pigeons & Planes 重新上线了网站，伴随更新的设计与内容策略。这反映出独立媒体在平台变动后如何演进、寻求变现并恢复出版。

items.title_en: Trump orders US Government to cut ties with Anthropic
items.title_zh: 特朗普下令政府切断与 Anthropic 的关系
items.summary_en: Donald Trump ordered the US government to sever ties with Anthropic, signaling a political dimension to AI procurement and governance. The move could affect government research partnerships, contracts, and the broader AI policy landscape.
items.summary_zh: 特朗普下令政府切断与 Anthropic 的关系，显示出AI采购与治理中的政治因素。此举可能影响政府研究合作、合同和更广泛的AI政策格局。

items.title_en: This System Can Go Fuck Itself and Burn in Hell
items.title_zh: 这个系统去他的，见鬼去吧
items.summary_en: A blistering take aimed at a flawed system, outlining why it fails users and how it could be replaced. The author argues for radical change and accountability, using blunt rhetoric to cut through bureaucracy. The piece serves as a rallying cry for redesigning or delegitimizing broken processes.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇对一个存在缺陷的系统的愤怒式评论，阐述其为何让用户失望以及可以如何被替换。作者主张进行根本性变革并追究责任，用直言不讳的语言穿透官僚体制。文章像是对被破坏流程的重新设计与正名的号召。

items.title_en: Show HN: Vibe Code your 3D Models
items.title_zh: Show HN：Vibe Code 将你的 3D 模型编码化
items.summary_en: Vibe Code enables scripting or programmatic generation of 3D models, lowering the barrier for programmers to create CAD assets. The Show HN post signals a lightweight path to model creation without heavy GUI workflows.
items.summary_zh: Vibe Code 通过脚本化方式让开发者能用代码生成和修改 3D 模型，降低了创建 CAD 资产的门槛。Show HN 的帖子表明可以无需繁琐的图形界面就实现模型创建。

items.title_en: The history of knocking on wood
items.title_zh: 敲木头的历史
items.summary_en: Examines the history of knocking on wood, tracing its roots in Neolithic culture to modern superstition and ritual, connecting anthropology to everyday habits.
items.summary_zh: 考察敲木头这一习惯的历史渊源，从新石器时代到现代迷信与仪式，连接人类学与日常行为。

items.title_en: Typed Assembly Language (2000)
items.title_zh: 类型化汇编语言
items.summary_en: Typed Assembly Language introduces types into low-level code to enforce safety guarantees at the assembly boundary. This Cornell project explores safeguarding interfaces between high-level type systems and low-level execution, paving paths toward more secure systems.
items.summary_zh: 类型化汇编语言在底层代码中引入类型，从而在汇编边界上提供安全保障。该计划将高层类型系统与低层执行结合，帮助推导正确性并提高系统安全性，推动编译器安全设计的研究。

items.title_en: Devirtualization and Static Polymorphism
items.title_zh: 逆虚拟化与静态多态
items.summary_en: Explains how devirtualization interacts with static polymorphism, showing how compilers can replace dynamic dispatch with static calls for performance gains while preserving polymorphic interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 解释去虚拟化如何与静态多态交互，展示编译器如何在保持多态接口的前提下，将动态调度转为静态调用以提升性能。

items.title_en: Meta problem with URPF our bundle in Boca raton
items.title_zh: Boca Raton 的 URPF 相关元问题
items.summary_en: This post discusses a meta problem related to URPF (Unicast Reverse Path Forwarding) in a network bundle located in Boca Raton, illustrating how routing policy interactions can complicate security and traffic management. It underscores the importance of careful network configuration and validation to prevent spoofing or packet loss.
items.summary_zh: 文中讨论了位于博卡拉顿的网络包中与 URPF（单播返回路径转发）相关的元问题，展示了路由策略交互如何使安全与流量管理变得复杂。强调在网络配置与验证中避免欺骗与数据包丢失的重要性。

items.title_en: Detecting and Preventing Distillation Attacks
items.title_zh: 检测与防止蒸馏攻击
items.summary_en: Anthropic outlines detection and mitigation strategies for distillation attacks on AI models, addressing security risks when compressing AI models and preserving safety.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 提出检测与缓解 AI 蒸馏攻击的策略，聚焦在对模型压缩过程中的安全风险与安全性保持。

items.title_en: What Pressure Does to an Athlete's Body
items.title_zh: 压力对运动员身体的影响
items.summary_en: Examines how psychological and physiological pressure affects athletes, influencing performance, recovery, and injury risk. The piece draws implications for training, preparation, and mental health strategies.
items.summary_zh: 研究心理与生理压力如何影响运动员的表现、恢复与受伤风险，并就训练、备战与心理健康提出启示。

items.title_en: Show HN: A geometric analysis of Chopin's Prelude No. 4 using 3D topology
items.title_zh: 用三维拓扑分析肖邦前奏曲第四首
items.summary_en: A geometric case study of Chopin's Prelude No. 4 using 3D topology reveals structural relationships in harmony, offering a novel mathematical lens on classical music.
items.summary_zh: 用三维拓扑对肖邦前奏曲第四首进行几何分析，揭示和声中的结构关系，提供一种新颖的数学视角来理解古典音乐。

items.title_en: January in Servo: preloads, better forms, details styling, and more
items.title_zh: Servo 一月更新：预加载、表单改进、细节样式等
items.summary_en: Servo’s January updates highlight performance and UX improvements, including preloads to speed up navigation, better forms, and refined styling details. The post illustrates how these changes impact web rendering performance and developer experience.
items.summary_zh: Servo 的一月更新聚焦性能与用户体验的提升，包括预加载以加速导航、表单改进以及样式细节的优化。文章展示了这些改动对网页渲染性能和开发者体验的影响。

items.title_en: Gauss's Weekday Algorithm, Visualized
items.title_zh: 高斯的星期几算法可视化
items.summary_en: Gauss's weekday algorithm is a compact, arithmetic method for determining the day of the week for any date. The visualization breaks the steps down, highlighting how leap years and century corrections are handled. It makes a historic trick approachable and practical for quick mental calcs.
items.summary_zh: 本文用可视化方式展示高斯日期星期几的算法，分解日期转换成星期几的算术步骤，并解释闰年与世纪校正的处理。直观图解揭示这类日历算法的简洁性与实用性，使这段百年老算法更易于心算应用。

items.title_en: The Hydrogen Truck Problem Isn't the Truck
items.title_zh: 氢动力卡车的问题不在于卡车本身
items.summary_en: The hydrogen freight debate shifts from the truck to fueling infrastructure and energy logistics. The post argues that refueling economics, hydrogen availability, and supply chains are the real bottlenecks for hydrogen-powered trucking.
items.summary_zh: 氢动力货运的问题不在卡车本身，而在于加氢基础设施与能源供应链。文章讨论加氢效率、绿色氢的可用性及从柴油向氢的经济性挑战。

items.title_en: Why Your Load Balancer Still Sends Traffic to Dead Backends
items.title_zh: 为什么负载均衡仍会把流量发给已死后端
items.summary_en: A discussion on why load balancers can still route traffic to dead backends due to misconfigured health checks or stale state. It contrasts client-side and server-side health checks and offers practical fixes to improve uptime.
items.summary_zh: 探讨由于健康检查配置错误或状态陈旧，负载均衡仍会将流量路由到失效后端的原因，并对比客户端与服务器端健康检查，给出提升可用性的实用修复建议。

items.title_en: Tuna: A new, modern, modal launcher for macOS
items.title_zh: Tuna：现代化的 macOS 模态启动器
items.summary_en: Tuna is a modern macOS modal launcher designed to speed up application launching via a keyboard-driven, focused interface. It emphasizes speed, discoverability, and a streamlined UX for power users.
items.summary_zh: Tuna 是一个现代化的 macOS 模态启动器，通过键盘驱动的专注界面提升应用启动速度，强调快速性、易发现性与简洁的用户体验，适合高效工作者。

items.title_en: Stop Killing Games update says EU petition advances
items.title_zh: Stop Killing Games 更新：欧盟请愿取得进展
items.summary_en: An EU petition related to Stop Killing Games appears to be gaining traction, signaling growing regulatory and advocacy attention. The development affects digital rights and how policy makers approach gaming-related issues.
items.summary_zh: Stop Killing Games 的欧盟请愿似乎正在获得关注，显示出监管与倡议活动的增长势头。此事将影响数字权利与政策制定者对游戏相关议题的处理方式。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a self-hosted course platform in Clojure
items.title_zh: Show HN：我用 Clojure 构建了一个自托管的课程平台
items.summary_en: Show HN post detailing a self-hosted course platform built in Clojure, including architecture decisions, features, and deployment notes. A practical example of building education tooling with a modern Lisp ecosystem and open-source ethos.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 分享了用 Clojure 构建的自托管课程平台，涵盖架构设计、功能与部署要点。展示了在现代 Lisp 生态与开源精神下打造教育工具的可行性。

items.title_en: The Origins of Agar
items.title_zh: 琼脂的起源
items.summary_en: Traces the discovery and development of agar and its impact on microbiology and cuisine, highlighting its scientific and cultural journey.
items.summary_zh: 追踪琼脂的发现与发展及其在微生物学和烹饪中的影响，展现其科学与文化演变。

items.title_en: 1Password pricing increasing up to 33% in March
items.title_zh: 1Password 价格上涨约 33%
items.summary_en: 1Password plans a March price increase of up to 33%, affecting both personal and business subscriptions. The change may push users to reassess value, shop around, and consider long-term subscription strategies.
items.summary_zh: 1Password 将于三月涨价，涨幅最高约 33%，影响个人与企业订阅。用户需要评估价值、对比替代方案，并考虑长期订阅策略。

items.title_en: Show HN: Beehive – Multi-Workspace Agent Orchestrator
items.title_zh: Beehive——多工作区代理编排器
items.summary_en: Beehive is a multi-workspace agent orchestrator that coordinates several AI agents across tasks and contexts. It aims to simplify building complex AI workflows, lowering integration friction and enabling more scalable automation.
items.summary_zh: Beehive 是一个多工作区代理编排器，协调多个 AI 代理在不同任务和场景中的协作。它旨在简化复杂 AI 工作流的构建，降低集成难度并提升自动化的可扩展性。

items.title_en: Package Managers à la Carte: a formal model of dependency resolution
items.title_zh: 按需定制的包管理器：依赖解析的形式模型
items.summary_en: Proposes a formal framework for dependency resolution to reason about package manager behavior, enabling safer, more flexible strategies. The work clarifies the trade-offs between determinism, performance, and user intent.
items.summary_zh: 提出了一个依赖解析的形式化模型，用于研究包管理器的行为，便于实现更安全、可组合的策略。该模型揭示了确定性、性能和用户意图之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: ZSE – Open-source LLM inference engine with 3.9s cold starts
items.title_zh: Show HN: ZSE —— 开源的 LLM 推理引擎，冷启动仅 3.9 秒
items.summary_en: ZSE is an open-source LLM inference engine promising 3.9s cold starts, which could enable faster local inference for researchers and developers. By optimizing CPU/GPU pipelines and memory layouts, it demonstrates competitive startup latency for on-device AI.
items.summary_zh: ZSE 是一个开源的 LLM 推理引擎，声称冷启动仅 3.9 秒，便于在本地进行推理。通过对 CPU/GPU 管线和内存布局的优化，展示了对启动延迟的显著改善。

items.title_en: NIST Seeking Public Comment on AI Agent Security (Deadline: March 9, 2026)
items.title_zh: NIST 就 AI Agent 安全性征求公众意见（截至2026年3月9日）
items.summary_en: NIST is seeking public comment on AI agent security, inviting input on threat models, governance, and practical controls. The process signals increasing regulatory attention to AI agent safety and interoperability for vendors and users.
items.summary_zh: NIST 正就 AI 助手安全性征求公众意见，邀请就威胁模型、治理与实际控制措施提供反馈。该进程表明监管对 AI 助手安全与互操作性的关注日益增加，影响厂商和用户的设计与部署。

items.title_en: Show HN: Agent Swarm – Multi-agent self-learning teams (OSS)
items.title_zh: Show HN: Agent Swarm – 多代理自学习团队（开源）
items.summary_en: Agent Swarm is an OSS framework for coordinating multiple self-learning agents as a team. It illustrates emergent teamwork among AI agents and offers a practical path to building distributed, capable systems.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个开源框架，用于协同多代理组成团队共同学习。展示了代理间的协作涌现，并提供构建分布式、强大系统的现实路径。

items.title_en: AI is destroying open source, and it's not even good yet [video]
items.title_zh: AI 正在摧毁开源，甚至还没成熟 [视频]
items.summary_en: A video arguing that AI-powered coding tools threaten open-source ecosystems, highlighting licensing ambiguity and potential shifts in contribution dynamics. It questions sustainability as AI tools become more capable and pervasive.
items.summary_zh: 视频讨论了 AI 代码工具可能对开源生态造成的冲击，聚焦许可不清晰与贡献生态的潜在转变。随着 AI 工具能力提升、应用日益广泛，持续性成为关注点。

items.title_en: The Science of Detecting LLM-Generated Text (2024)
items.title_zh: 识别 LLM 生成文本的科学研究
items.summary_en: Researchers survey the methods for detecting text produced by large language models, highlighting the limitations of current classifiers and watermarking approaches. The study shows detectors struggle with newer model generations and domain shift, underscoring that no single method is reliable across all contexts. The takeaway is that robust detection will require a multi-pronged strategy combining statistical cues, watermarking, and human-in-the-loop validation.
items.summary_zh: 研究评估了现有检测大语言模型生成文本的方法，指出当前分类器和水印等手段的局限性。对最新模型和跨领域文本的检测仍存在显著挑战，单一方法难以全面可靠。关键在于结合统计线索、水印技术以及人工复核的多方位策略来提升鲁棒性。

items.title_en: Gzpeek: Tool to Parse Gzip Metadata
items.title_zh: Gzpeek：解析 Gzip 元数据的工具
items.summary_en: Gzpeek exposes metadata stored in gzip files, such as header flags, modification times, and optional fields that aren’t always visible in standard tooling. This makes it valuable for forensics, data verification, and debugging pipelines. The tool helps engineers understand data provenance and integrity more precisely.
items.summary_zh: Gzpeek 能揭示 gzip 文件中的元数据，如头部标志、修改时间以及常规工具较少显示的可选字段，适用于取证、数据校验和调试流程。该工具帮助工程师更精确地理解数据来源与完整性。

items.title_en: Python Type Checker Comparison: Empty Container Inference
items.title_zh: Python 类型检查器对空容器推断的对比
items.summary_en: Different Python type checkers vary in how they infer types for empty containers like [] and {}, affecting type-safety and potential false positives. The comparison highlights trade-offs between inference precision and annotation burden, offering practical guidance on choosing a checker and annotating code to improve results.
items.summary_zh: 不同的 Python 类型检查器在对空容器（如 []、{}）的类型推断上差异明显，可能影响类型安全并带来误报。对比揭示了推断精度与标注成本之间的权衡，并就选择检查器与编写提示给出实用建议。

items.title_en: Manjaro website off-line again due to lapsed certificate
items.title_zh: Manjaro 网站离线再次因证书过期
items.summary_en: Manjaro's website went offline again after an TLS certificate expired, disrupting access for users and developers. The incident underscores the importance of certificate lifecycle management and automated monitoring for open-source projects.
items.summary_zh: Manjaro 官方网站因为证书过期再次离线，影响了用户和开发者的访问。此事件凸显了证书生命周期管理和对开源项目的自动化监控的重要性。

items.title_en: Lidar waveforms are worth 40x128x33 words
items.title_zh: 激光雷达波形可压缩成 40×128×33 的表示
items.summary_en: Researchers show LiDAR waveforms can be represented compactly as 40×128×33 words, enabling more expressive perception with far less data. The approach could accelerate autonomous sensing stacks by reducing data bandwidth and memory requirements.
items.summary_zh: 论文提出将激光雷达波形紧凑编码为相当于40×128×33个词的表述，便于在更少数据量下实现更丰富的感知能力。此方法有望加速自动驾驶等对雷达数据依赖的感知流水线并降低带宽需求。

items.title_en: Those who can, teach history
items.title_zh: 那些能讲好历史的人为何应投身教学
items.summary_en: The piece argues that people with historical understanding are best placed to teach it, exploring teaching methods, history education access, and public understanding.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张具备历史素养的人最适合教授历史，探讨教学方法、历史教育的普及与公众理解之间的关系。

items.title_en: Eschewing Zshell for Emacs Shell (2014)
items.title_zh: 放弃 Zshell，改用 Emacs Shell（Eshell）
items.summary_en: Reflects on using Eshell over external shells like Zsh, highlighting tighter Emacs integration, Lisp scripting, and a workflow that minimizes context switching. The 2014 write-up shares practical experiences and trade-offs for Emacs-centric workflows.
items.summary_zh: 回顾在工作流中放弃外部 shell 而使用 Emacs 内置 Eshell 的经验，强调与 Emacs 的无缝集成、Elisp 脚本化，以及减少上下文切换的优点。此文为 2014 年的实践笔记，讨论了以 Emacs 为中心的工作流的权衡。

items.title_en: A NASA Engineer Discovered a World of Semi Truck Aerodynamics by Accident
items.title_zh: 一名 NASA 工程师偶然发现半挂车空气动力学的新世界
items.summary_en: A NASA engineer’s accidental research leads to new aerodynamic insights for semi-trucks, with potential fuel-efficiency gains, drag reductions, and implications for highway transport.
items.summary_zh: 一位 NASA 工程师偶然发现的半挂车空气动力学新现象，可能带来燃油效率提升和更低阻力，对公路运输影响深远。

items.title_en: Evil in the West Bank
items.title_zh: 西岸的邪恶
items.summary_en: A provocative essay exploring violence in the West Bank, analyzing the moral complexities, historical context, and human impact of the ongoing conflict.
items.summary_zh: 一篇发人深省的随笔，探讨西岸地区的暴力，分析冲突的道德复杂性、历史背景及对普通人的影响。

items.title_en: C64 Copy Protection
items.title_zh: C64 拷贝保护
items.summary_en: An overview of the copy protection schemes used on Commodore 64 games, illustrating the ongoing cat-and-mouse between developers and crackers. The piece sheds light on how protection worked and what it reveals about 1980s software distribution dynamics.
items.summary_zh: 本文概述了 C64 游戏所使用的拷贝保护机制，揭示开发者与破解者之间的博弈。内容还揭示了这些保护手段如何反映上世纪八十年代的软件分发生态。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Share your productive usage of OpenClaw
items.title_zh: Ask HN：分享你对 OpenClaw 的高效用法
items.summary_en: People share real-world workflows using OpenClaw, including automation, prototyping, and integration with other tools; examples illustrate how developers squeeze productivity from the project.
items.summary_zh: 社区成员分享了 OpenClaw 的实际应用场景，如自动化、快速原型开发以及与其他工具的整合，展示了从该项目中获得的高效工作流。

items.title_en: What I Learned After Building 3 TV Apps Coming from Mobile
items.title_zh: 从移动端到电视应用：构建3个电视应用后的所学
items.summary_en: Lessons learned migrating from mobile to TV apps cover UX constraints, remote-control navigation, app performance, and ecosystem differences, offering guidance for future cross-platform product work.
items.summary_zh: 分享从移动端迁移到电视应用的经验教训，涵盖用户体验、遥控导航、性能与生态系统差异，为后续跨平台开发提供指引。

items.title_en: Inferring car movement patterns from passive TPMS measurements
items.title_zh: 从被动 TPMS 测量推断汽车运动模式
items.summary_en: Presents methodology to infer driving behavior and route patterns by analyzing tire-pressure monitoring system data, even when devices are not actively tracked. Highlights privacy implications and potential applications for traffic analysis, fleet optimization, but also warrants safeguards.
items.summary_zh: 通过对被动 TPMS 数据的分析，推断出车辆的驾驶行为和行驶路线，披露了隐私风险。该方法对交通分析和车队优化具有潜在应用，同时需要相应的隐私保护措施。

items.title_en: Inventing the Lisa user interface – Interactions
items.title_zh: 发明 Lisa 用户界面 — 互动
items.summary_en: An exploration of the Lisa UI's origin and its influence on later graphical interfaces, focusing on design decisions, user interaction patterns, and the legacy of early personal computers.
items.summary_zh: 对 Lisa 用户界面的起源及其对后续图形界面的影响进行探讨，聚焦设计决策、用户交互模式及早期个人电脑的遗产。

items.title_en: A lithium-ion breakthrough that could boost range and lower costs
items.title_zh: 可能提升续航并大幅降成本的锂离子技术突破
items.summary_en: Researchers report a lithium-ion breakthrough that could extend EV range and dramatically reduce costs, potentially reshaping battery supply chains and vehicle pricing.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员披露一项锂离子技术突破，或有望提升电动车续航并显著降低成本，或将重塑电池供应链与车辆定价。

items.title_en: Baby chicks pass the bouba-kiki test, challenging a theory of language evolution
items.title_zh: 小鸡通过 Bouba-Kiki 测试，挑战语言进化理论
items.summary_en: Baby chicks pass the Bouba-Kiki test, suggesting that perceptual biases used to map sounds to shapes may not be unique to humans. The finding questions a central assumption about how language evolves, indicating that some foundational cognitive biases could be shared with other species.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现小鸡也能完成 Bouba‑Kiki 测试，表明将声音与形状关联的感知偏好并非人类独有。此结果对语言进化核心假设提出挑战，提示某些基础认知偏好可能在其他物种中也存在。

items.title_en: SpacetimeDB ThreeJS Support
items.title_zh: SpacetimeDB 增加 ThreeJS 支持与免费等级
items.summary_en: SpacetimeDB now supports Three.js, enabling developers to render time-aware data in interactive 3D scenes, plus a free tier lowers the barrier to experimentation.
items.summary_zh: SpacetimeDB 新增对 Three.js 的支持，方便开发者在交互式 3D 场景中可视化时空数据；同时提供免费层，降低上手门槛。

items.title_en: Georgian wine culture dates back, uninterrupted, approximately 8k years
items.title_zh: 格鲁吉亚葡萄酒文化约已有8000年的连续历史
items.summary_en: Georgia's wine heritage spans around 8,000 years with ancient winemaking practices, including amphora traditions and early grape varieties.
items.summary_zh: 格鲁吉亚的葡萄酒传统可追溯至约8000年前，早期就有陶罐发酵等酿酒技艺。文章梳理了当地主要葡萄品种、风格，以及琥珀酒等特色工艺，彰显该国对全球葡萄酒史的影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Rev-dep – 20x faster knip.dev alternative build in Go
items.title_zh: Show HN: Rev-dep 用 Go 实现的比 knip.dev 更快的构建工具
items.summary_en: Rev-dep, a Go-based tool, claims to rebuild dependency graphs about 20x faster than knip.dev-style alternatives. It demonstrates how language-appropriate tooling can drastically cut Go project build times and improve iteration speed.
items.summary_zh: Rev-dep 是一个用 Go 编写的构建工具，宣称在重建依赖图方面比 knip.dev 等替代方案快约 20 倍，显著缩短 Go 项目的开发反馈周期。

items.title_en: NASA uses Mars Helicopter's SoC for rover navigation upgrade
items.title_zh: NASA 将火星直升机的系统级芯片用于车载导航升级
items.summary_en: NASA is upgrading rover navigation using the Mars Helicopter's SoC, enabling more autonomous routing and reducing reliance on ground control.
items.summary_zh: NASA 将火星直升机的 SoC 用于升级车载导航，提升自主路径规划能力，减少对地面控制的依赖。

items.title_en: Frankensqlite a Rust reimplementation of SQLite with concurrent writers
items.title_zh: Frankensqlite：用 Rust 重实现 SQLite，支持并发写入
items.summary_en: Frankensqlite is a Rust reimplementation of SQLite that supports concurrent writers, offering a different concurrency model from the original C-based engine. It showcases Rust's safety guarantees in embedded databases and raises questions about compatibility, tooling, and performance trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: Frankensqlite 是一个用 Rust 重实现的 SQLite，支持并发写入，展现了 Rust 在嵌入式数据库中的安全性优势。它带来与原生 SQLite 的兼容性、工具链和性能取舍相关的讨论。

items.title_en: Burger King will use AI to check if employees say 'please' and 'thank you'
items.title_zh: 汉堡王将用人工智能检查员工是否说‘请’和‘谢谢’
items.summary_en: Burger King plans to deploy AI that analyzes cashier and crew interactions to enforce polite language like 'please' and 'thank you'. Critics argue it could enable surveillance and micromanagement, while proponents say it could improve customer service.
items.summary_zh: 汉堡王计划部署AI，分析收银和员工互动是否使用“请/谢谢”等礼貌用语。批评者担忧监控与微管理，支持者则认为可提升服务质量。

items.title_en: Lil' Fun Langs' Guts
items.title_zh: Lil' Fun Langs 的内部实现
items.summary_en: Lil' Fun Langs dives into the guts of a tiny, playful language, detailing its parser, runtime, and design trade-offs. The piece draws practical lessons on how minimalism influences tooling, ergonomics, and the ease of experimentation when building approachable languages.
items.summary_zh: Lil' Fun Langs 讲解了这门小巧、有趣的语言的内部实现，涵盖解析器、运行时以及设计取舍。文章从实作角度总结了极简设计对工具链、可用性和实验性的影响。

items.title_en: Don't Cite Unsold eBay Listing Prices
items.title_zh: 不要引用未售出的 eBay 列价
items.summary_en: Don't Cite Unsold eBay Listing Prices argues against using unsold listings as price signals, since those prices rarely reflect what items actually fetch. The post advocates more reliable valuation approaches and better data hygiene for price benchmarking.
items.summary_zh: 文章反对以未售出商品的eBay挂牌价作为价格信号，因为这些价格往往并不反映成交价。作者倡导更可靠的估值方法和更清洁的数据来做价格基准。

items.title_en: What is f(x) ≤ g(x) + O(1)? Inequalities With Asymptotics
items.title_zh: 渐近不等式：f(x) ≤ g(x) + O(1) 的含义
items.summary_en: The post explains how to interpret f(x) ≤ g(x) + O(1) in asymptotic analysis, clarifying how constant terms affect practical bounds. It helps distinguish between tight mathematical bounds and real-world performance implications.
items.summary_zh: 文章讲解了渐近分析中 f(x) ≤ g(x) + O(1) 的含义，阐明常数项在实际界限中的影响，帮助区分严格的数学界限与实际性能的关系。

items.title_en: Show HN: Chaos Monkey but for Audio Video Testing (WebRTC and UDP)
items.title_zh: Show HN：面向音视频测试的 Chaos Monkey（WebRTC 与 UDP）
items.summary_en: Chaos Monkey-style tool for audio and video testing simulates random network faults in WebRTC and UDP pipelines to reveal fragility and improve resilience.
items.summary_zh: Chaos Monkey 风格的音视频测试工具可以在 WebRTC 与 UDP 的传输中随机注入网络故障，以暴露脆弱点并提升鲁棒性。

items.title_en: Number of UK workers on zero-hours contracts hits record high ahead of crackdown
items.title_zh: 英国零小时合同工数量创历史新高，监管行动在即
items.summary_en: UK zero-hours contracts reached a record high as policymakers tighten the screws on precarious work. The data underscores ongoing flexibility in the labor market and fuels policy debates about worker protections.
items.summary_zh: 英国零小时合同工数量达到历史新高，监管行动近在眉睫。数据凸显劳动市场的持续灵活性，并推动关于劳工保护的政策辩论。

items.title_en: Some silly Z3 scripts I wrote
items.title_zh: 我写过的一些有趣的 Z3 脚本
items.summary_en: A collection of playful Z3 scripts showcases the solver's flexibility for reasoning tasks and automation. The examples reveal how SMT techniques can solve puzzles, verify properties, or automate coding tasks in creative ways.
items.summary_zh: 一组有趣的 Z3 脚本展示了求解器在推理任务与自动化中的灵活性。示例展现了如何用 SMT 技术解决谜题、验证属性或以创造性方式自动化编码任务。

items.title_en: The rise of eyes began with just one
items.title_zh: 眼睛的演化从一个起点开始
items.summary_en: A feature on how eyes evolved as complex organs, tracing how early photoreceptor cells diversified into diverse eye types across species. It highlights the modular nature of biological innovation and how a single starting point can lead to vast diversity.
items.summary_zh: 文章讲述眼睛作为复杂器官的进化过程，追溯早期光感受器细胞如何在不同物种中演化出多样的眼部结构，强调生物创新的模块化特性以及一个起点如何孕育出广泛的多样性。

items.title_en: PA bench: Evaluating web agents on real world personal assistant workflows
items.title_zh: PA Bench：在真实个人助理工作流中评估网页代理
items.summary_en: PA Bench introduces real-world benchmarks to assess web agents across typical personal assistant workflows. It highlights gaps between lab performance and practical reliability, guiding future improvements.
items.summary_zh: PA Bench 提出在真实个人助理工作流中的网页代理评测基准，揭示实验室表现与实际应用之间的差距。评估重点包括完成任务、可靠性和对场景的契合度。

items.title_en: The History of a Security Hole
items.title_zh: 一个安全漏洞的历史
items.summary_en: A historical account tracing the evolution and discovery of a notable security hole, including initial misconfigurations, exploitation paths, patches, and lessons for defense. It sheds light on how small design flaws propagate into systemic risk.
items.summary_zh: 对一个著名安全漏洞的演变过程进行历史梳理，涵盖初期配置失误、利用路径、修补过程及对防御的启示，揭示微小设计缺陷如何累积成系统性风险。

items.title_en: Decimal-Java is a library to convert java.math.BigDecimal to and from IEEE-754r
items.title_zh: Decimal-Java：在 Java BigDecimal 与 IEEE-754r 之间转换的库
items.summary_en: Decimal-Java provides conversion between BigDecimal and IEEE-754r decimal floating-point representation, addressing precision concerns for financial and scientific apps. It simplifies interoperability between Java and decimal standards.
items.summary_zh: Decimal-Java 提供 BigDecimal 与 IEEE-754r 十进制浮点表示之间的双向转换，旨在解决金融与科学应用中的精度问题，并促进 Java 与十进制标准的互操作性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Cellarium: A Playground for Cellular Automata
items.title_zh: Show HN：Cellarium——一个细胞自动机的练习场
items.summary_en: Cellarium provides a playground for cellular automata, offering a sandbox to tinker with rules, neighborhoods, and emergent patterns. It’s a practical resource for learning CA concepts and experimenting with simulations.
items.summary_zh: Cellarium 为细胞自动机提供一个实验区，允许用户试验规则、邻域与涌现模式，是学习与探索 CA 的实用工具。

items.title_en: Ferret-UI Lite: Lessons from Building Small On-Device GUI Agents
items.title_zh: Ferret-UI Lite：在设备上构建小型 GUI 代理的经验教训
items.summary_en: Ferret-UI Lite distills learnings from building on-device GUI agents, focusing on lightweight interfaces, offline capability, and resource constraints. It shares practical design patterns for edge AI tools that run without cloud connectivity.
items.summary_zh: Ferret-UI Lite 汇总了在设备上构建 GUI 代理的经验，聚焦轻量界面、离线能力和资源约束，提供面向边缘 AI 工具的实用设计模式。

items.title_en: Show HN: SQLite for Rivet Actors – one database per agent, tenant, or document
items.title_zh: Rivet Actors 的 SQLite——每个代理/租户/文档一个数据库
items.summary_en: SQLite for Rivet Actors proposes one database per agent, tenant, or document, enabling clean isolation in multi-agent systems. It offers simplicity and fault containment, while trading off cross-entity querying and management headaches.
items.summary_zh: 为 Rivet Actors 引入每个代理、租户或文档一个数据库的 SQLite 方案，实现多代理系统中的清晰隔离。简化性与故障隔离性有优势，但跨实体查询与管理成本可能上升。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tag Promptless on any GitHub PR/Issue to get updated user-facing docs
items.title_zh: Show HN：在任意 GitHub PR/Issue 上标记 Promptless 以获得更新的用户文档
items.summary_en: A Show HN project uses a 'Promptless' label on GitHub PRs and issues to trigger updates to user-facing docs. It showcases how lightweight metadata can help keep documentation aligned with code changes and reduce drift.
items.summary_zh: 这个 Show HN 项目在任意 GitHub 的 PR/Issue 上打上“Promptless”标签，以触发用户文档的生成或同步。它展示了通过简单元数据实现文档与代码变更保持一致的思路，减少文档漂移。

items.title_en: Show HN: Decided to play god this morning, so I built an agent civilisation
items.title_zh: Show HN：今晨决定扮演上帝，于是搭建了一个代理文明
items.summary_en: Show HN: Decided to play god this morning, so I built an agent civilisation, detailing architecture, behaviors, and the challenges of simulating autonomous agents at scale.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：今晨决定扮演上帝，于是搭建了一个代理文明，分享架构、行为设计与大规模仿真自主代理的挑战。

items.title_en: Time-Travel Debugging: Replaying Production Bugs Locally
items.title_zh: 时光穿梭调试：在本地重现生产环境中的错误
items.summary_en: Time-travel debugging describes deterministic replay of production bugs locally, enabling developers to diagnose issues without deploying to prod. Techniques include capturing inputs, state, and logs to faithfully reproduce issues.
items.summary_zh: 时光穿梭调试实现了对生产环境错误的可确定性重放，使开发者能够在本地诊断问题而无需部署到生产环境。文中介绍了捕获输入、状态和日志等方法，确保问题能够被准确重现。

items.title_en: What Your DNA Reveals about the Sex Life of Neanderthals
items.title_zh: 西岸之恶
items.summary_en: David Shulman examines moral and political dimensions of violence in the West Bank, offering a nuanced view of daily life amid conflict and the legacies of occupation.
items.summary_zh: 大卫·舒尔曼在文章中审视西岸暴力的道德与政治维度，呈现冲突与长期占领背景下的日常生活及其复杂情感。

items.title_en: Why High FOV Sucks – Fixing It with Panini Projection
items.title_zh: 为什么高视场角不理想？用 Panini 投影来修复
items.summary_en: Why a wide field of view is problematic for VR/AR and how Panini projection helps reduce distortion at the edges without sacrificing immersion.
items.summary_zh: 阐释了过宽视场在 VR/AR 中的种种问题，以及 Panini 投影如何在边缘降低失真、提升沉浸感的同时保持视野。

items.title_en: An AI doomsday report shook US markets
items.title_zh: AI 末日报告震撼美国市场
items.summary_en: An AI doomsday-type report rattles markets, highlighting perceived risks of runaway automation and systemic threats while urging governance. The story illustrates how sentiment around AI risk can influence markets and policy debates.
items.summary_zh: 一份 AI 末日报告震撼市场，强调对失控自动化和系统性风险的担忧并呼吁治理框架。报道反映了对 AI 风险的情绪如何影响市场与监管讨论。

items.title_en: Tiny QR code achieved using electron microscope technology
items.title_zh: 利用电子显微镜技术实现的微型二维码
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrated a QR code at micrometer scale using electron microscopy, pushing nano-scale data encoding into the realm of physical labels. The result hints at future applications in nanotech tagging and anti-counterfeit schemes.
items.summary_zh: 研究者展示了利用电子显微镜技术实现的微型二维码，推动纳米尺度数据编码及在标签、溯源等领域的潜在应用。

items.title_en: Graph Topology and Battle Royale Mechanics
items.title_zh: 图拓扑与大逃杀机制
items.summary_en: A post linking graph topology concepts with battle royale mechanics, showing how pruning and beam search strategies can model territory control and player dynamics. It offers takeaways for game AI and algorithm design.
items.summary_zh: 博文将图的拓扑结构与大逃杀机制联系起来，展示如何用束搜索和图剪枝等技术建模地图控制与玩家动态。为游戏人工智能与算法设计提供可借鉴的思路。

items.title_en: Move tests to closed source repo
items.title_zh: Move tests to closed source repo
items.summary_en: A debate over moving tests to a closed-source repository, weighing security and IP protection against openness and collaboration. The note considers impact on contributors, tooling, and governance of code quality.
items.summary_zh: 关于将测试迁移到闭源仓库的讨论，权衡安全与知识产权保护与开源协作之间的取舍，分析对贡献者、工具链及代码质量治理的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Leaked Documents Show Meta Cracking Down on Access to Abortion Information
items.title_zh: 泄露的文档显示 Meta 正在限制获取堕胎信息
items.summary_en: Leaked documents reveal Meta's policies to block access to abortion information in its AI chatbots, prompting questions about censorship, safety trade-offs, and user information needs.
items.summary_zh: 泄露的文档揭示 Meta 正在通过其 AI 聊天机器人阻断获取堕胎信息的策略，引发关于审查、安全取舍与用户信息需求的讨论。

items.title_en: 56% of CEOs report zero financial return from AI in 2026 (PwC survey, n=4,454)
items.title_zh: 56%的CEO表示 2026 年 AI 未带来金融回报（PwC 调查）
items.summary_en: PwC's 2026 survey shows 56% of CEOs report zero AI-driven financial return, signaling feedback that AI investments are not yet translating into tangible value for most organizations. The results underscore the need for better alignment to business outcomes and governance.
items.summary_zh: PwC 的 2026 年调查显示，56% 的 CEO 表示 AI 未带来金融回报，表明大多数组织尚未将 AI 投资转化为可量化的价值。结果强调需要将 AI 与具体业务成果及治理结构更好地对齐。

items.title_en: Otters as Bioindicators of Estuarine Health
items.title_zh: 水獭作为河口健康的生物指示物
items.summary_en: Otters are studied as bioindicators to assess estuarine health, correlating otter presence with water quality, prey availability, and habitat integrity. The research supports using charismatic megafauna as practical proxies for ecosystem status, aiding conservation and policy decisions.
items.summary_zh: 研究将水獭作为河口健康的生物指示物，将水獭栖息情况与水质、猎物资源和栖息地完整性相关联。此类研究支持以具吸引力的大型动物作为生态系统状态的代理指标，帮助制定保护和管理政策。

items.title_en: Show HN: Scheme-langserver – Digest incomplete code with static analysis
items.title_zh: Show HN：Scheme-langserver——通过静态分析提取不完整代码的语言服务器
items.summary_en: Scheme-langserver provides static-analysis-based digesting of incomplete Scheme code to aid editor tooling. It demonstrates how lightweight static analysis can support development in niche languages.
items.summary_zh: Scheme-langserver 利用静态分析对不完整的 Scheme 代码进行摘要，帮助编辑器工具链。该项目展示了轻量级静态分析在小众语言开发中的可行性。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Programmable Watches with WiFi?
items.title_zh: 带 WiFi 的可编程智能手表？
items.summary_en: People discuss feasibility, power budgets, and security implications of Wi‑Fi capable programmable smartwatches. The conversation touches on microcontroller limits, firmware ecosystems, and potential energy trade-offs for always-on connectivity.
items.summary_zh: 讨论带 Wi‑Fi 的可编程智能手表的可行性、能耗和安全性。话题涉及微控单元、固件生态，以及始终保持联网对小型佩戴设备的能源权衡与开发生态。

items.title_en: Cronboard: A terminal-based dashboard for managing cron jobs
items.title_zh: Cronboard：一个用于管理 cron 作业的终端仪表板
items.summary_en: Cronboard provides a terminal-based dashboard to manage cron jobs, offering a lightweight CLI alternative to web dashboards for visibility and control over scheduled tasks.
items.summary_zh: Cronboard 提供一个终端仪表板，用于管理 cron 作业，作为对网页仪表板的轻量化 CLI 替代，提升对计划任务的可视化和控制。

items.title_en: Show HN: Mission Control – Open-source task management for AI agents
items.title_zh: Mission Control：开源的 AI 代理任务管理
items.summary_en: Mission Control is an open-source task manager tailored for AI agents, enabling teams to orchestrate and track agent workflows. It aims to bring more structured governance and collaboration to autonomous AI systems, open for community contributions.
items.summary_zh: Mission Control 是一个面向 AI 代理的开源任务管理工具，帮助团队编排并跟踪代理工作流。它旨在为自治 AI 系统带来更结构化的治理与协作，欢迎社区贡献。

items.title_en: Out of Light Adjust Share: Caravaggio, La Tour, and the Art of Attention
items.title_zh: 光影之术：卡拉瓦乔与拉图尔及注意力的艺术
items.summary_en: An exploration of how Caravaggio and La Tour manipulate light to direct attention and narrative in Baroque painting.
items.summary_zh: 探讨卡拉瓦乔与拉图尔在巴洛克绘画中如何通过光线引导观众注意力与叙事。

items.title_en: Generalized Sequential Probability Ratio Test for Families of Hypotheses [pdf]
items.title_zh: 广义序贯似然比检验（多假设族）[PDF]
items.summary_en: A statistical note introduces GSPRT for testing multiple hypotheses in a sequential framework, useful for streaming data, adaptive experimentation, or real-time decision-making.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍了广义序贯似然比检验（GSPRT）在一族假设的序贯框架下的应用，适用于流数据、自适应实验和实时决策。

items.title_en: Stardew Valley at 10: The pixel art farm game that became an unlikely phenomenon
items.title_zh: 星露谷物语十周年：这款像素风农场游戏的非同寻常现象
items.summary_en: Ten years after its release, Stardew Valley remains a cult indie hit thanks to tight systems, moddability, and warm pixel art. Its success reshaped indie publishing, inspired a wave of imitators, and influenced how developers approach sustainability and community engagement.
items.summary_zh: 十周年之际，星露谷物语凭借精巧的系统、广泛的模组支持和温暖的像素美学成为现象级独立游戏。它改变了独立发行的格局，影响了后续作品的开发与社区互动的持续性。

items.title_en: SynthID
items.title_zh: SynthID：合成媒体身份识别技术
items.summary_en: SynthID introduces a robust watermarking approach for AI-generated content to help verify authenticity and provenance. It’s a step toward combating misinformation, but also foreshadows an arms race between watermarking and evasion and raises questions about policy, ethics, and user trust.
items.summary_zh: SynthID 提出了一种稳健的水印机制，用以标识 AI 生成内容的真实性与来源。这是打击错误信息的一步，但也预示着水印对抗技术的竞赛，以及对政策、道德与用户信任的讨论。

items.title_en: Everything Changes, and Nothing Changes
items.title_zh: 一切在改变，同时也不改变
items.summary_en: Everything Changes, and Nothing Changes reflects on how rapid, broad shifts occur alongside enduring fundamentals, offering a lens on strategy and resilience in tech.
items.summary_zh: 快速变革与持续不变的基本面并存，提供了关于技术策略与韧性的观察视角。

items.title_en: Lords of the Ring
items.title_zh: 擂台之王：文化政治、相扑与权力
items.summary_en: An examination of power dynamics in sumo culture and its intersection with politics and media. The piece uses sumo as a lens to discuss how tradition and modernity collide in national identity and cultural influence.
items.summary_zh: 通过对相扑文化中的权力结构及其与政治、媒体的交叉影响进行考察，以相扑作为镜头探讨传统与现代性在国家认同与文化影响力中的冲突与融合。

items.title_en: How Long Is the Coast of Britain? (1967)
items.title_zh: 英国海岸线有多长？（1967）
items.summary_en: How Long Is the Coast of Britain? (1967) is a landmark discussion in fractal geometry showing that coastline length depends on measurement scale, introducing the concept of fractal dimension and scale invariance that reshaped how we model natural forms.
items.summary_zh: 1967 年的这篇论文成为分形几何的里程碑，揭示海岸线长度取决于测量尺度，并引入分形维数与尺度不变性的概念，改变了我们建模自然现象的方式。

items.title_en: 3D-Printed electric motor via multi-modal, multi-material extrusion
items.title_zh: 通过多模态多材料挤出技术实现的 3D 打印电动机
items.summary_en: A report on a 3D-printed electric motor produced with multi-modal, multi-material extrusion, illustrating the potential for integrated, lightweight motor components. It discusses trade-offs in performance, thermal management, and manufacturability of such custom parts.
items.summary_zh: 报道展示了通过多模态、多材料挤出技术实现的 3D 打印电动机，体现了一体化、轻量化部件的潜力。文章评估了性能、热管理与可制造性等权衡。

items.title_en: Scent, in Silico
items.title_zh: 计算机模拟中的气味研究：Scent, in Silico
items.summary_en: Scent, in Silico discusses computational approaches to scent design and fragrance discovery, highlighting how AI-assisted chemistry could accelerate product development in perfumery and beyond.
items.summary_zh: 《计算机模拟中的气味研究：Scent, in Silico》探讨了香味设计与香水发现的计算方法，强调 AI 辅助的化学在香料与相关领域的研发提速潜力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Context Mode – 315 KB of MCP output becomes 5.4 KB in Claude Code
items.title_zh: Show HN：Context Mode—315 KB 的 MCP 输出在 Claude Code 中压缩为 5.4 KB
items.summary_en: Context Mode demonstrates dramatic output compression in Claude Code, shrinking 315 KB of MCP output down to 5.4 KB while preserving essential context. This signals a breakthrough for memory-heavy coding tasks, enabling leaner contexts and potential speedups in code reasoning and generation.
items.summary_zh: Context Mode 展示了在 Claude Code 中对 MCP 输出的显著压缩，将 315 KB 的输出压缩至 5.4 KB，同时保留关键上下文。这一做法对需要大量上下文的代码任务具有重要意义，能降低内存占用并提升推理效率。

items.title_en: Teen social media ban group funded and co-staffed by firm making gambling ads (2025)
items.title_zh: 由制作赌博广告的公司资助并协同运营的青少年社媒禁令倡议团队
items.summary_en: A teen social media ban advocacy group is funded and co-staffed by a firm that runs gambling ads, raising concerns about conflicts of interest and the authenticity of policy advocacy in tech regulation conversations.
items.summary_zh: 一个推动青少年社媒禁令的倡议组织由经营赌博广告的公司资助并共同人员化运作，引发关于利益冲突与政策倡导真诚性的质疑。该事件凸显在科技政策领域资金来源如何影响公众议题的讨论。

items.title_en: Nihilistic Violent Extremism
items.title_zh: 虚无主义暴力极端主义
items.summary_en: Nihilistic violent extremism is examined, outlining its nihilistic roots, appeal to disenfranchised individuals, and the societal challenges it poses.
items.summary_zh: 概述虚无主义暴力极端主义的根源、对边缘人群的吸引力，以及对社会稳定带来的挑战。

items.title_en: Show HN: Vertex.js – A 1kloc SPA Framework
items.title_zh: Show HN：Vertex.js 一个 1k 行的单页应用框架
items.summary_en: A tiny SPA framework clocking in at about 1,000 lines of code, focusing on minimalism and performance. It demonstrates how much functionality can fit into a compact framework and serves as a teaching example for lean frontend design.
items.summary_zh: 一个约 1000 行代码的极简单页应用框架，强调性能与简洁。它展示了在极小规模内也能实现的核心前端能力，并可作为学习与教学的范例。

items.title_en: Running Neural Amp Modeler on embedded hardware
items.title_zh: 在嵌入式硬件上运行 Neural Amp Modeler
items.summary_en: Demonstrates porting Neural Amp Modeler to embedded hardware, tackling latency, memory, and power constraints for real-time audio processing. This work shows AI-powered audio models running closer to sensors and end devices.
items.summary_zh: 展示将 Neural Amp Modeler 移植到嵌入式硬件，解决实时音频处理中的延迟、内存和功耗等约束，体现了将 AI 音频模型部署在传感器端设备的可行性。

items.title_en: Anthropic gives Opus 3 exit interview, "retirement" blog
items.title_zh: Anthropic 公布 Opus 3 退出与退役博客
items.summary_en: Anthropic deprecates Opus 3 with an official retirement update, guiding customers to migrate to newer models and providing a clear sunset path for the product.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布 Opus 3 退役更新与退出博客，提供迁移到更新模型的指导，并给出清晰的产品退役路径。

items.title_en: Theory of Constraints: "Blue Light" creating capacity for nothing (2007)
items.title_zh: 约束理论：'蓝光' 让产能看起来存在却无实际产出（2007）
items.summary_en: Theory of Constraints: 'Blue Light' creates apparent capacity without real throughput, a cautionary note about buffered capacity inflating productivity metrics in operations research.
items.summary_zh: 约束理论中的“蓝光”现象指通过缓冲容量制造表面产能，但并未带来实际产出，提醒运营研究中缓冲容量可能夸大生产力指标。

items.title_en: Show HN: Modern Reimplementation of the Speck Molecule Renderer
items.title_zh: Show HN: 现代化的 Speck 分子渲染器实现
items.summary_en: Show HN: Modern Reimplementation of the Speck Molecule Renderer presents a refreshed codebase with improved performance and usability for visualizing molecular structures.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：现代化的 Speck 分子渲染器实现，提供改进的代码库、性能与可用性，提升分子可视化体验。

items.title_en: Monitor the Situation
items.title_zh: Monitor the Situation：中东局势监测
items.summary_en: Monitor-the-Situation provides real-time geopolitical monitoring focused on the Middle East, aggregating signals and analysis to help engineers gauge potential disruption risks.
items.summary_zh: 提供关于中东地区的实时监测与分析，聚合数据与洞察，帮助工程与运维团队在风险情境下做出更明智的决策。

items.title_en: 'Play like a dog biting God's feet': Steven Isserlis on György Kurtág at 100
items.title_zh: “像狗咬上帝的脚一样演奏”：史蒂文·艾瑟里斯谈 György Kurtág 百周年
items.summary_en: Steven Isserlis offers a vivid perspective on Kurtág's music in the composer’s centennial year. The piece delves into Kurtág's economy of expression and how performers navigate his compact, intensely expressive lines, offering insights into contemporary classical technique.
items.summary_zh: 大提琴家史蒂文·艾瑟里斯在库塔格百周年之际，提出对库塔格音乐的生动解读。文章深入探讨库塔格简练而强烈的表达方式，以及演奏者如何驾驭其紧凑、极具表现力的乐句，为当代古典演奏技巧提供洞见。

items.title_en: Sam Altman: We raised a $110B round from Amazon, Nvidia, SoftBank
items.title_zh: 山姆·奥特曼：我们从亚马逊、英伟达、软银等筹集了一笔 1100 亿美元融资
items.summary_en: Sam Altman reveals a colossal funding round led by major tech firms, underscoring the scale of AI infrastructure bets and the capital needed to push large models and cloud ecosystems. The disclosure highlights how capital and strategic partnerships are accelerating the race to larger models, faster compute, and broader software ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 山姆·奥特曼披露由亚马逊、英伟达和软银等领投的一笔 colossal 融资，凸显了推动大模型、云基础设施的资金需求与战略伙伴关系的加速效应。

items.title_en: AI-powered reverse-engineering of Rosetta 2 (for Linux VM)
items.title_zh: 基于 AI 的 Rosetta 2 逆向工程（用于 Linux 虚拟机）
items.summary_en: An AI-powered tool aims to reverse-engineer Rosetta 2 for Linux VMs, enabling smoother x86_64/ARM translation in virtualization contexts. It demonstrates how AI can assist cross-platform compatibility work.
items.summary_zh: 一个 AI 驱动的工具旨在让 Rosetta 2 在 Linux 虚拟机上工作，提升虚拟化环境中的跨平台兼容性。展示了 AI 在跨平台兼容性任务中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: US Gov Deploys Grok as Nutrition Bot, It Advises for Rectal Use of Vegetables
items.title_zh: 美国政府部署 Grok 作为营养机器人，竟建议蔬菜直肠用法
items.summary_en: Grok is deployed as a government nutrition bot and has drawn attention for its controversial dietary guidance. The episode raises questions about AI safety, prompt design, and guardrails in public tools.
items.summary_zh: 报道描述政府将 Grok 部署为营养助手，并因其争议性饮食建议引发关注。事件凸显公众工具中 AI 安全、提示设计与治理边界的问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gitcredits – movie-style end credits for any Git repo in your terminal
items.title_zh: Show HN：Gitcredits——在终端为任意 Git 仓库生成像电影结尾的致谢
items.summary_en: Gitcredits renders movie-style end credits for any Git repo in your terminal, providing attribution and a playful way to acknowledge contributions.
items.summary_zh: Gitcredits 能在终端为任意 Git 仓库生成电影风格的致谢页，用以致谢贡献者并增添趣味性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Sgai – Goal-driven multi-agent software dev (GOAL.md → working code)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Sgai——目标驱动的多智能体软件开发（GOAL.md 转为可运行代码）
items.summary_en: Sgai demonstrates goal-driven multi-agent software development, translating GOAL.md specifications into functioning code. The project explores automating software design with agent-based reasoning.
items.summary_zh: Sgai 展示了以目标驱动的多智能体软件开发，将 GOAL.md 的规范转化为可工作代码，探索用智能体推理自动化软件设计。

items.title_en: Microspeak: Escrow
items.title_zh: Microspeak: 托管
items.summary_en: Microspeak: Escrow explains the software escrow concept—holding code or assets in trust for future access—and why it matters to customers and vendors.
items.summary_zh: Microspeak: Escrow 解释软件托管的概念——为未来访问而托管代码或资产，以及它对客户与厂商的重要性。

items.title_en: How to record and retrieve anything you've ever had to look up twice
items.title_zh: 记录并检索你曾多次查找过的任何信息
items.summary_en: A personal knowledge-base approach that captures repeated lookups into a searchable archive, making it easy to retrieve past queries without re-remembering details. It emphasizes ownership and organization of your own search history, enabling faster discovery and reducing cognitive load. This could inform tools and workflows for knowledge workers.
items.summary_zh: 通过把重复查找的信息纳入可搜索的个人知识库，帮助用户轻松检索历史查询，避免重复记忆。该方法强调对自身搜索历史的拥有和组织，提升检索效率、降低认知负担。它还可能为知识工作者的工作流提供新思路。

items.title_en: Tech Firms Aren't Just Encouraging Their Workers to Use AI. They're Enforcing It
items.title_zh: 科技公司不仅鼓励员工使用 AI，还在强制执行
items.summary_en: The article reports on tech firms mandating AI usage for employees, with policies, governance, and enforcement measures shaping daily workflows and productivity. It discusses potential benefits and risks, including privacy, compliance, and the shifting power dynamics as AI becomes a standard tool in the workplace.
items.summary_zh: 文章报道科技公司正在强制要求员工使用 AI，并设立治理与执行机制来规范日常工作。这带来潜在的生产力提升，同时也引发隐私、合规和职场权力结构的变化等风险与讨论。

items.title_en: Show HN: Recursively apply patterns for pathfinding
items.title_zh: Show HN：通过递归应用模式实现路径查找
items.summary_en: Show HN presents a method that recursively applies predefined patterns to guide pathfinding, enabling modular, rule-based navigation. The approach could inform game AI or robotics planners.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一种递归应用预设模式来进行路径寻找的方法，实现模块化、基于规则的导航。此思路可能为游戏 AI 或机器人规划提供启示。

items.title_en: Free Font: Times New Resistance
items.title_zh: 免费字体：Times New Resistance
items.summary_en: Times New Resistance is a free font release with a bold, readable aesthetic inspired by mid-20th-century design.
items.summary_zh: Times New Resistance 是一款免费字体，以介于 20 世纪中期设计风格的大胆、易读美感为特色，适合网页和排版设计。

items.title_en: What I learned while trying to build a production-ready nearest neighbor system
items.title_zh: 在尝试打造生产就绪的最近邻系统时我学到了什么
items.summary_en: Building a production-grade KNN system taught hard lessons about indexing choices, hardware constraints, and operational debt. The write-up highlights practical tradeoffs among latency, memory, update throughput, and observability, with concrete tips for real-world deployments.
items.summary_zh: 在尝试构建生产就绪的最近邻系统时学到的经验包括索引方案的选择、硬件限制与运维负担。文中总结了延迟、内存、更新吞吐量与可观测性之间的权衡，并给出落地部署的实用建议。

items.title_en: What was the first life restoration of a sauropod?
items.title_zh: 首个长颈龙活体复原的故事
items.summary_en: Tracing the first life restoration of a sauropod, the piece traces how paleontologists built early representations from scarce fossils, and how interpretations have evolved with new evidence.
items.summary_zh: 追溯首个长颈龙类活体复原的进程，展示古生物学家如何在化石证据有限的情况下逐步构建初代外形，以及新证据如何改变后来的诠释。

items.title_en: Ed's Stratego Site
items.title_zh: Ed 的 Stratego 站点
items.summary_en: Ed's Stratego Site offers rules, strategies, and resources for Stratego players, serving as a stable hub for board-game fans.
items.summary_zh: Ed's Stratego Site 提供 Stratego 的规则、策略与资源，成为桌游爱好者的稳定信息中心。

items.title_en: Show HN: Terminal-Style Portfolio on the Internet
items.title_zh: Show HN：终端风格的个人作品集
items.summary_en: Show HN features a portfolio built with a terminal-like UI, highlighting minimalism and keyboard-driven navigation. It demonstrates that a compact, design-forward approach can stand out in a crowded web portfolio space.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一个以终端式 UI 构建的个人作品集，强调极简风格和键盘导航。它证明了在拥挤的网页作品集中，紧凑且有设计感的实现也能脱颖而出。

items.title_en: How Dada enables internal references
items.title_zh: Dada 如何实现内部引用
items.summary_en: Dada provides a mechanism for internal references within a document, codebase, or data structure, enabling cross-links without external bindings. The post explains the design, usage patterns, and benefits for navigation, refactors, and consistency. It also discusses potential pitfalls and compatibility considerations.
items.summary_zh: Dada 提供在文档、代码库或数据结构中创建内部引用的机制，使跨引用无需外部绑定成为可能。文章介绍了设计思路、使用模式与对导航、重构及一致性的重要性，同时讨论潜在的陷阱与兼容性考量。

items.title_en: Self-improving software won't produce Skynet
items.title_zh: 自我改进的软件不会催生天网
items.summary_en: Recursive self-improvement isn't a free path to Skynet. Real-world systems face safety, alignment, and governance constraints that limit runaway upgrading. Without careful design, automated improvements can be brittle or misaligned.
items.summary_zh: 递归式自我改进并非通往天网的捷径。现实系统受安全、对齐与治理等约束，限制了升级的失控速度。若缺乏周密设计，自动化的改进可能变得脆弱或与目标偏离。

items.title_en: LibreOffice resumes work on its self-hosted Google Docs alternative
items.title_zh: LibreOffice 继续开发自托管的 Google Docs 替代方案
items.summary_en: LibreOffice is continuing work on a self-hosted cloud office suite as an alternative to Google Docs, focusing on compatibility, privacy, and local control. The effort aims to provide an open, community-driven productivity platform for organizations seeking self-hosting.
items.summary_zh: LibreOffice 继续开发自托管的云端办公套件，作为 Google Docs 的替代选项，强调兼容性、隐私与本地控制。该项目旨在为寻求自托管的组织提供一个开源、社区驱动的生产力平台。

items.title_en: Scipy.stats. Chatterjeexi
items.title_zh: SciPy.stats：chatterjeexi 分布
items.summary_en: SciPy's stats module includes the 'chatterjeexi' distribution, a rare or specialized distribution used for testing or statistical modeling. The entry highlights the ongoing expansion of SciPy's statistical toolbox and niche distributions.
items.summary_zh: SciPy 的统计模块新增了 'chatterjeexi' 分布，属于较为小众的统计模型。此举体现了 SciPy 统计工具箱的持续扩展和对特定应用的覆盖。

items.title_en: Hacking Tauri for Designer
items.title_zh: 为设计师定制 Tauri 的实践指南
items.summary_en: A practical guide to tailoring the Tauri framework for designer workflows, showing tweaks to streamline UI prototyping, asset integration, and deploying desktop apps built with web technologies.
items.summary_zh: 本文展示如何把 Tauri 框架定制得更符合设计师的工作流，包含简化 UI 原型、资源整合与基于网页技术的桌面应用部署等实用优化。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tomoshibi – A writing app where your words fade by firelight
items.title_zh: Show HN：Tomoshibi——在火光中逐渐淡出的写作应用
items.summary_en: Tomoshibi is a writing app where words fade by firelight, creating a contemplative writing experience. The project explores how temporality and focus constraints shape creative workflow in the terminal.
items.summary_zh: Tomoshibi 是一款让文字在火光中逐渐淡出的写作应用，营造沉思式写作体验。它探索时间性与专注约束如何影响终端环境下的创作流程。

items.title_en: Show HN: OpenSwarm – Multi‑Agent Claude CLI Orchestrator for Linear/GitHub
items.title_zh: Show HN: OpenSwarm——用于 Claude 的多代理 CLI 协调器
items.summary_en: OpenSwarm is a multi-agent CLI orchestrator for Claude, enabling coordinated tasks across agents and tools. It demonstrates practical workflow composition for LLM-powered automation with GitHub integration.
items.summary_zh: OpenSwarm 提供一个用于 Claude 的多代理 CLI 调度器，能让多个代理协同完成任务并接入工具链。展示了将 LLM 驱动的工作流与 GitHub 等工具整合的实际方法。

items.title_en: How Can Infinity Come in Many Sizes?
items.title_zh: 无穷大可以有多种尺寸吗？
items.summary_en: Explores the concept that infinity comes in many sizes through set theory, discussing cardinalities and the distinction between countable and uncountable infinities with approachable examples.
items.summary_zh: 从集合论角度解释无穷大并非单一量级，而是有多种不同的大小，通过基数比较与可数/不可数之分，给出易懂的示例。

items.title_en: How the Federal Government Is Painting Immigrants as Criminals on Social Media
items.title_zh: 联邦政府如何在社交媒体上将移民描绘成罪犯
items.summary_en: Investigations show government agencies using social media to portray immigrants as criminals, raising concerns about misinformation, civil rights, and political signaling. The coverage discusses impact on communities, enforcement practices, and trust in online discourse.
items.summary_zh: 调查显示政府机构在社交媒体上将移民描绘成罪犯，引发关于错误信息、公民权利与政治信号传递的担忧。报道分析对社区的影响、执法做法及公众信任的影响。

items.title_en: Two insider cases we've recently closed
items.title_zh: 我们最近结案的两起内部交易案件
items.summary_en: Kalshi announces two insider-trading enforcement cases that have been closed, detailing violations and outcomes. The move signals ongoing regulatory enforcement in event-based trading.
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 公布了最近结案的两起内部交易执法案件，披露违规行为与处理结果。该举动显示事件驱动交易领域监管正在持续加强。

items.title_en: Seeing Like a Sedan
items.title_zh: 像轿车一样看世界
items.summary_en: Seeing Like a Sedan argues that familiar design and framing influence how we build and experience technology, using car-centric thinking to critique urban and software infrastructures.
items.summary_zh: 以轿车视角审视设计思维如何影响技术构建与使用，借此批判城市与软件基础设施背后的隐性假设。

items.title_en: The Slow Death of the Power User
items.title_zh: 强力用户的慢慢消退
items.summary_en: The essay argues that the 'power user' archetype is fading as products hide complexity behind opinionated defaults, cloud services, and safety rails. It cautions that technology's productivity gains come at the cost of deeper control and customization.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为“强力用户”的形象正在消退，产品通过默认设定、云服务和安全策略隐藏了复杂性。作者警示技术在带来生产力的同时，牺牲了深度控制和定制能力。

items.title_en: Read Locks Are Not Your Friends
items.title_zh: 读锁不是你的朋友
items.summary_en: The post argues that read locks can hinder concurrency and lead to performance issues in distributed systems; it suggests alternative synchronization patterns like lock-free data structures or optimistic concurrency.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为读锁可能阻碍并发、导致分布式系统的性能问题；建议采用无锁数据结构或乐观并发等替代同步模式。

items.title_en: Quasi-Zenith Satellite System
items.title_zh: 准天顶卫星系统（QZSS）
items.summary_en: The Quasi-Zenith Satellite System augments GPS to improve positioning in challenging environments and urban canyons. It represents a regional effort to boost location accuracy for users in Japan and nearby areas.
items.summary_zh: 准天顶卫星系统通过区域卫星导航增强 GPS，提升在高楼林立区域的定位精度。该系统主要覆盖日本及周边区域，提升本地化能力。

items.title_en: 30 Years of Decompilation and the Unsolved Structuring Problem: Part 1 (2024)
items.title_zh: 三十年的反编译与未解决的结构化问题：第一部分（2024）
items.summary_en: A retrospective on decompilation history, focusing on the ongoing challenge of recovering high-level structure from binaries. It discusses why structural organization remains hard and how tooling is evolving to bridge the gap.
items.summary_zh: 回顾性论文聚焦反编译史中的长期难题：如何从二进制中还原高级结构。讨论为何结构化组织仍然困难，以及工具如何演进以缩小这一差距。

items.title_en: Dictionary Compression is finally here, and it's ridiculously good
items.title_zh: 字典压缩技术终于问世，性能提升惊人
items.summary_en: A dictionary-based compression approach arrives with surprisingly strong performance gains over traditional methods, potentially reducing bandwidth and storage costs across systems.
items.summary_zh: 基于字典的压缩方法带来出色的性能提升，可能显著降低系统的带宽与存储成本，对各类应用场景都具潜在影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Logira – eBPF runtime auditing for AI agent runs
items.title_zh: Show HN：Logira——用于 AI 代理运行的 eBPF 运行时审计
items.summary_en: Logira introduces eBPF-based runtime auditing for AI agent runs, offering visibility into actions and a layer of security for AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: Logira 基于 eBPF 的运行时审计工具，为 AI 代理执行提供可观测性并提升工作流的安全性。

items.title_en: I Built a Scheme Compiler with AI in 4 Days
items.title_zh: 4 天内用 AI 构建 Scheme 编译器
items.summary_en: The author chronicles building a Scheme compiler with AI assistance in four days, delivering a working prototype. The piece candidly discusses AI-generated code limitations, debugging experiences, and practical patterns for integrating AI into compiler projects.
items.summary_zh: 作者记录了在四天内借助 AI 构建 Scheme 编译器的过程，产出了一个可用的原型。文中坦诚了 AI 生成代码的局限性、调试过程和在编译器项目中与 AI 协作的实用模式。

items.title_en: US Customs destroy a rare floppy disk containing demo version of Tsukihime
items.title_zh: 美国海关销毁含有《月姬》演示版的稀有软盘
items.summary_en: A rare demo floppy disk for Tsukihime was destroyed in transit by US Customs, highlighting fragility of physical media and the rarity of early digital relics. The incident underscores the collectible value and challenges of preserving vintage games and demos.
items.summary_zh: 美国海关销毁了一张珍贵的软盘，里面存有《月姬》演示版的拷贝，是玩家和收藏家追捧的稀有遗物。该事件凸显了实体介质的脆弱性以及数字保存面临的挑战。

items.title_en: Reverse engineering the KakaoTalk app so I can build a Beeper Bridge
items.title_zh: 反向工程 KakaoTalk 应用以构建 Beeper 桥接器
items.summary_en: Detailing the reverse engineering of KakaoTalk to build a Beeper bridge, the post covers techniques, risks, and how such bridges enable cross-app notifications and messaging workflows.
items.summary_zh: 详细介绍对 KakaoTalk 应用的逆向工程以构建 Beeper 桥接器，涵盖实现技术、潜在风险，以及桥接在跨应用通知与消息工作流中的作用。

items.title_en: Attyx – tiny and fast GPU-accelerated terminal emulator written in Zig
items.title_zh: Attyx——用 Zig 编写的极小且快速的 GPU 加速终端仿真器
items.summary_en: Attyx is a tiny GPU-accelerated terminal emulator written in Zig, prioritizing speed and low resource usage while staying portable and easy to build.
items.summary_zh: Attyx 是用 Zig 编写的极小且快速的 GPU 加速终端仿真器，强调高性能、低资源占用，并保持便携与易于构建。

items.title_en: Evolving descriptive text of mental content from human brain activity
items.title_zh: 从脑部活动中生成描述性文本
items.summary_en: Researchers continue to evolve methods that translate brain signals into descriptive text, inching toward more natural and expressive brain-computer interfaces. The advances enable richer glimpses into mental content while raising questions about privacy, consent, and how we measure 'thought' in real time. These developments broaden potential uses from communication aids to neurotech monitoring.
items.summary_zh: 研究者正在改进将脑信号转化为描述性文本的方法，向更自然、富表达的脑机接口迈进。相关进展使对思维内容的理解更丰富，同时引发隐私、知情同意以及如何实时衡量“思想”的讨论。这些发展拓展了从信息传递帮助到神经技术监测的潜在应用。

items.title_en: A girls' elementary school was hit in Iran
items.title_zh: 伊朗一所女生小学遭袭
items.summary_en: New video and OSINT analysis examine an attack on a girls' elementary school in Iran, raising concerns about civilian safety and regional security dynamics. The coverage emphasizes the human impact and the need for accountability in conflict zones.
items.summary_zh: 最新视频与开源情报分析关注伊朗一所女生小学遭遇袭击的事件，凸显平民安全与区域安全格局的担忧。报道强调了对受害者的影响以及在冲突区域实现问责的必要性。

items.title_en: Enable CORS for Your Blog
items.title_zh: 为你的博客启用 CORS
items.summary_en: A pragmatic guide to enabling CORS on a blog, outlining how to configure response headers to allow cross-origin asset access while avoiding common pitfalls that may introduce security risks. Includes tips on when to enable, what to expose, and how to audit the impact.
items.summary_zh: 本文提供在博客上启用 CORS 的实用指南，讲解如何配置响应头以允许跨域资源访问，同时避免常见的安全隐患。包括何时开启、暴露哪些信息以及如何评估影响。

items.title_en: Microsoft announces new "mini PCs" for Windows 365
items.title_zh: 微软推出用于 Windows 365 的迷你电脑
items.summary_en: Microsoft expands Windows 365 with compact 'mini PC' devices, offering affordable cloud PC endpoints and enabling flexible remote work setups.
items.summary_zh: 微软通过推出迷你 PC 设备扩大 Windows 365 生态，提供更实惠的云端 PC 端点并支持灵活的远程工作部署。

items.title_en: A Fuzzer for the Toy Optimizer
items.title_zh: 面向 toy 优化器 的模糊测试
items.summary_en: Fuzzing guides design improvements and demonstrates practical approaches for teaching fuzzing concepts.
items.summary_zh: 文中介绍如何为一个 toy 优化器设计模糊测试器，以暴露边界情况和稳健性缺陷，这些往往是单元测试难以发现的。通过模糊测试，作者展示了如何改进设计并教授模糊测试的实践要点。

items.title_en: Foods destroying rainforests, in one simple chart
items.title_zh: 导致雨林破坏的食品，一张简单图表
items.summary_en: A simple chart links a small set of foods—beef, soy, palm oil, and others—to rainforest deforestation, outlining the supply-chain drivers and environmental impact. The piece emphasizes how consumer choices and production systems drive ecological harm and calls for sustainable sourcing.
items.summary_zh: 一张简单图表将少数食品（如牛肉、大豆、棕榈油等）与雨林砍伐联系起来，梳理供给链驱动因素及环境影响。文章强调消费选择与生产体系对生态破坏的推动作用，并呼吁更可持续的采购。

items.title_en: Waymo robotaxi blocks EMS responding to Austin mass shooting
items.title_zh: Waymo 自动驾驶出租车在奥斯汀枪击事件中阻挡急救车
items.summary_en: Waymo's robotaxi reportedly blocked emergency responders during a mass shooting in Austin, prompting questions about autonomous vehicles' emergency-right-of-way rules and safety protocols.
items.summary_zh: 据称 Waymo 的自动驾驶出租车在奥斯汀一起大规模枪击中阻挡了急救车，引发关于无人车在紧急情况下优先通行与安全协议的讨论。

items.title_en: SHELL: Global Tool for Calling and Chaining Procedures in the System (1965) [pdf]
items.title_zh: SHELL：1965 年的全局调用与流程连接工具（PDF）
items.summary_en: This 1965-era tool provides a global interface for invoking and chaining procedures throughout a computer system, predating modern shells.
items.summary_zh: 这是 1965 年的早期工具，提供在整个系统中调用与串联过程的全局接口，早于现代 Shell 的雏形。

items.title_en: The man building Team USA's Olympic bobsleds
items.title_zh: 打造美国奥运雪车队雪橇的人
items.summary_en: Profile of a Lake Placid-based engineer designing and building bobsleds for Team USA, detailing the craftsmanship, materials, and iterative design process. It highlights how local resources and hands-on experimentation contribute to elite athletic hardware.
items.summary_zh: 讲述位于 Lake Placid 的一名工程师，如何为美国队打造奥运雪橇，介绍工艺、材料和反复设计的过程。

items.title_en: FCaptcha – A modern CAPTCHA system designed to detect everything
items.title_zh: FCaptcha——一个现代 CAPTCHA 系统，旨在检测几乎一切
items.summary_en: FCaptcha proposes a modern CAPTCHA system with enhanced bot-detection capabilities and adaptive challenges designed to outpace automated solvers.
items.summary_zh: FCaptcha 提出一种现代 CAPTCHA 体系，结合强化的机器人检测能力与自适应挑战，旨在提升对自动化破解的防护效果。

items.title_en: TPM-Sniffing LUKS Keys on an Embedded Linux Device [CVE-2026-0714]
items.title_zh: 在嵌入式 Linux 设备上嗅探 LUKS 密钥的 TPM 漏洞（CVE-2026-0714）
items.summary_en: A vulnerability allows TPM to leak LUKS passphrases on certain embedded devices, enabling offline decryption under conditions. Exploits require trusted hardware, but firmware updates and mitigations are essential for affected devices. The bug highlights the fragility of hardware-backed encryption when firmware is compromised.
items.summary_zh: 一个漏洞允许 TPM 在某些嵌入式设备上泄露 LUKS 密码短语，条件成立时可进行离线解密。攻击需要可信硬件，但固件更新和缓解措施对受影响设备至关重要。这一漏洞凸显了在固件被攻破时，硬件背后的加密也可能脆弱。

items.title_en: Have your cake and decompress it too
items.title_zh: 同时实现高压缩与快速解压的级联压缩方法
items.summary_en: Cascading compression technique demonstrates how to chain multiple compression layers to achieve small on-disk size while preserving fast random access. The approach is relevant for large datasets, backups, and systems where storage and latency both matter.
items.summary_zh: 级联压缩方法展示了将多种压缩层级串联起来，在保持快速随机访问的同时实现更小的磁盘占用。该思路对大数据集、备份和需要兼顾存储与延迟的系统具有实际意义。

items.title_en: CSP for Pentesters: Understanding the Fundamentals
items.title_zh: 渗透测试者的 CSP 基础
items.summary_en: CSP for Pentesters covers the fundamentals of Content Security Policy—directives, nonce management, reporting, and testing strategies. It shows how to assess and harden policies against common web vulnerabilities.
items.summary_zh: 本指南讲解内容安全策略（CSP）的基础要点，包括指令、Nonce 管理、报告与测试策略，帮助评估并强化对常见网页漏洞的防护。

items.title_en: Ask HN: My YC company is hiring one engineer/day but there's not enough work
items.title_zh: Ask HN：我的 YC 公司每天招聘一名工程师，但工作量不足
items.summary_en: There's a candid discussion about whether rapid hiring outpaces the actual work available. The thread touches on product-market fit, pipeline realism, and aligning engineering headcount with project velocity.
items.summary_zh: 关于一个 YC 支持的公司日招聘一名工程师却缺乏相应工作量的公开讨论。讨论聚焦于产品–市场契合、管线现实性，以及如何让研发人数与实际项目节奏相匹配。

items.title_en: Better Activation Functions for NNUE
items.title_zh: NNUE 的激活函数改进
items.summary_en: New activation functions for NNUE yield measurable gains in accuracy and efficiency for chess engines, especially on CPU. This helps improve evaluation speed and reduces energy use on mid-range hardware.
items.summary_zh: NNUE 的激活函数改进在棋类引擎中带来准确性和效率的提升，特别是在 CPU 上的评估速度得到改善，同时降低中端硬件的能耗。

items.title_en: Human brain cells on a chip learned to play Doom in a week
items.title_zh: 芯片上的人脑细胞一周内学会玩 Doom
items.summary_en: In a chip-based brain-cell experiment, cultures learned to play Doom within a week, illustrating rapid learning-like behavior in biological substrates and implications for neuromorphic research.
items.summary_zh: 在芯片上的脑细胞培养物一周内学会玩 Doom，展示了生物材料中近似快速学习的能力，对神经形态研究具有潜在意义。
